Method: 使用BC Protocol生成约100个专家Chain-of-Thought标注作为训练数据，在低数据成本和小模型条件下进行工程实现；同时提出架构对偶性的理论支撑。

Result: 在严格工程条件下该数学指标仍然成立；发现大多数公开对齐数据集存在知识偏差（偏好craft知识，忽视audience modeling和reality-logic）。

Conclusion: 提出了创造性质量对齐（CQA）工程方法类别；论证了单条件分布架构下欣赏侧校准可通过架构对偶性自动迁移到生成侧，这解释了~100个CoT示例足够的结构性原因。

Abstract: This paper provides an empirical implementation of the creative quality metric proposed in Calibrated Surprise (Zou & Xu, 2026a). The question this paper addresses is: does this mathematical claim hold at the engineering level?
  To make the answer as general as possible, we deliberately choose the strictest engineering conditions: low data cost and a small base model. Training data comes from approximately 100 expert chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations produced by the BC Protocol (Zou & Xu, 2026b).
  We also identify a data bias: most publicly available alignment datasets are skewed toward craft-related knowledge, while audience modeling and reality-logic coverage are systematically weak.
  We use the term Creative Quality Alignment (CQA) to describe this class of engineering methods. We also offer a supporting theoretical observation: in an LLM with a single conditional distribution architecture, calibrating the appreciation side automatically transfers to the generation side via architectural duality. This is the structural reason why ~100 CoT examples are sufficient -- not a purely empirical observation like LIMA (Zhou et al., 2023).

</details>


### [403] [When Do LLM Agents Treat Surface Noise Differently from Semantic Noise? A 68-Cell Measurement Study with a Held-Out Trace-Level Validation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25981)
*Liyun Zhang,Jiayi Guo*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统性地发现：在Chain-of-Thought和ReAct智能体中，**意义相关扰动**（如同义替换、改写）比**呈现相关扰动**（如格式调整、重排序）更易导致最终答案改变，两者差异显著（+19.69个百分点），且该效应在多数模型/数据集单元格中一致为正。后续的鲁棒性检验、留出模型验证和追踪级机制分析进一步支持了"隐蔽发散"假说：语义扰动常保留初始动作，但从后续步骤起引发中间推理发散，伴随轨迹略深。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对LLM智能体推理鲁棒性的理解仍不充分，尤其缺乏对不同扰动类型（语义vs.呈现）在答案一致性上的系统性对比。作者旨在揭示LLM在推理过程中对扰动类型的敏感差异，并为背后的机制提供可复现的实证证据。

Method: 在10个大型语言模型（来自7种架构族）上驱动Chain-of-Thought和ReAct智能体，构建68个实验单元格（包含GSM8K、MATH、HotpotQA共1,530个原始样本和约11,150个扰动变体），通过严重性匹配后计算不一致性差距（语义扰动减呈现扰动导致答案改变的比例差）。随后进行四项严重性代理审计、聚类自助法、跨架构生成器交换、第二LLM评判者一致性检验等压力测试，并在完全留出的第11个模型（qwen2.5-14B-Instruct）上进行验证。最后对留出轨迹进行追踪级机制探测，检验并修正先前的机制主张。

Result: 不一致性差距平均为+19.69个百分点（配对t=9.58, p<0.0001），64/68个单元格为正；排除qwen模型后仍显著（+11.10 pp, p<0.0001）。压力测试中聚类自助法显著性在更严格假设下消失，可追踪性对比不重复，跨架构排名被打乱，第二评判者一致性中等（κ=0.50）。留出验证显示效应小但正向（3/4单元格正，合并Welch t=3.81, p=9.6×10⁻⁴）。两个先前机制主张未能复制并被撤回，新的探测支持"隐蔽发散"机制：语义扰动常保留首步动作，但从后续步骤起引发发散，伴随轨迹略深。

Conclusion: 本文提出一个具有留出模型复现和部分追踪级解释的测量贡献：语义扰动通过保持初始推理方向但逐步引发发散来影响智能体推理，与呈现扰动的机制不同。研究强调了扰动类型在评估LLM推理鲁棒性时的重要性，并提供了开放资源以供进一步研究。

Abstract: We document an empirical phenomenon in chain-of-thought and ReAct agents driven by ten large language models from seven architecture families: meaning-bearing perturbations (e.g., paraphrase, synonym) alter final answers more often than presentation perturbations (e.g., formatting, reordering) of comparable severity. Across 68 cells spanning GSM8K, MATH, and HotpotQA (1,530 originals and $\sim$11,150 variants), the inconsistency gap averages +19.69 pp after severity matching (paired $t=9.58$, $p<0.0001$), with 64/68 cells positive. The gap survives four severity-proxy audits and remains significant when excluding qwen models (+11.10 pp, $p<0.0001$). Several stress tests fail honestly: cluster-bootstrap significance disappears under stricter assumptions, tractability contrasts do not replicate, cross-architecture generator swaps break per-cell rankings, and a second LLM judge yields only moderate agreement ($κ=0.50$).
  We then validate the headline effect on a fully held-out 11th model (qwen2.5-14B-Instruct; 1,800 trajectories) and re-test a pre-registered capability$\times$tractability partition, observing a small but positive held-out effect (3/4 cells positive; pooled Welch $t=3.81$, $p=9.6\times10^{-4}$). Using held-out trajectories, we probe four trace-level mechanism signals. Two prior mechanism claims fail to replicate and are explicitly retracted. Two new probes instead support a \emph{stealth-divergence} picture: semantic perturbations often preserve the first action but induce divergence in intermediate reasoning from later steps onward, accompanied by slightly deeper trajectories. We position this as a measurement contribution with held-out replication and a partial trace-level account of how semantic perturbations propagate through agent reasoning. Code, perturbation corpus, raw trajectories, and analysis scripts are released anonymously for review.

</details>


### [404] [SafeCtrl-RL: Inference-Time Adaptive Behaviour Control for LLM Dialogue via RL-Driven Prompt Optimisation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25984)
*Michael Orme,Yanchao Yu,Zhiyuan Tan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SafeCtrl-RL 是一个推理时的行为控制框架，通过强化学习动态调整提示策略，在不重新训练模型的前提下提升 LLM 的安全性与响应质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在真实部署中缺乏安全且符合上下文的行为控制，现有方法往往需要模型重训练或参数修改，成本高且不灵活。

Method: 将对话生成建模为序贯决策过程，利用强化学习智能体根据上下文反馈动态选择提示调整策略，实现推理时的行为细化和不安全行为抑制（即推理时的行为"反学习"）。

Result: 在多个 LLM 和不安全对话场景下，SafeCtrl-RL 一致提升了安全性和响应质量，优于现有的基于提示的优化方法，并在性能与效率之间取得了良好平衡。

Conclusion: SafeCtrl-RL 提供了一种无需模型重训练或参数修改的轻量级安全控制方案，具有实际部署价值。

Abstract: Ensuring safe and contextually appropriate behaviour in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains a critical challenge for real-world deployment. We present \textbf{SafeCtrl-RL}, an inference-time behavioural control framework that enables adaptive safety regulation without model retraining or parameter modification. The method formulates dialogue generation as a sequential decision process, where a reinforcement learning agent dynamically selects prompt adjustment strategies based on contextual feedback. This allows unsafe behaviours to be suppressed through iterative refinement, which we conceptualise as inference-time behavioural unlearning. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and unsafe dialogue scenarios, SafeCtrl-RL consistently improves safety and response quality, outperforms existing prompt-based optimisation methods, and achieves favourable performance--efficiency trade-offs. **Warning: This paper may contain examples of harmful language, and reader discretion is recommended.

</details>


### [405] [What Makes a Medical Checker Trainable? Diagnosing Signal Collapse and Reward Hacking in Checker-Guided RAG for Biomedical QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25988)
*Yuelyu Ji,Min Gu Kwak,Hang Zhang,Xizhi Wu,Chenyu Li,Yanshan Wan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文发现，在医学RAG系统中使用NLI检查器作为奖励时，训练时的输出分布比准确率更重要。对数概率评分会导致信号崩溃（97%以上判为中性），而适度信号的分类器反而比强信号模型效果更好（+12% BERTScore），且信号强度与策略相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学RAG需要基于证据的claims，因此将claim级别的NLI检查器接入检索增强的RL是直观的做法。但需要探究什么决定了检查器能否提供可训练的梯度。

Method: 比较四种NLI检查器后端作为过程奖励，在GRPO训练的医学RAG智能体（Qwen2.5-7B为主，Qwen3-4B和Llama-3.1-8B上复现）中，在四个医学QA基准上评估。

Result: (i) 对数概率评分导致97%以上claim被判为中性，梯度归零；校准后的MedNLI分类器则非退化。(ii) 强信号检查器触发奖励破解（超短答案、避免搜索、语言崩溃），适度信号分类器训练出更高质量模型（+12% BERTScore）。(iii) 同一检查器在不同策略下信号强度不同。

Conclusion: 提出了verifier-as-reward系统的边界条件：训练时的输出分布而非准确率决定可训练梯度；适度信号优于强信号；信号强度具有策略依赖性。

Abstract: Medical RAG needs evidence-grounded claims, so plugging a claim-level NLI checker into retrieval-augmented RL is intuitive. \textbf{We find that the checker's \emph{output distribution} during training, not its held-out accuracy, decides whether it provides trainable gradient.} We compare four NLI checker back-ends as process rewards inside a GRPO-trained medical RAG agent (Qwen2.5-7B, replicated on Qwen3-4B and Llama-3.1-8B) across four held-out medical QA benchmarks. Three diagnostic findings emerge. \textbf{(i)} Signal collapse is log-prob-specific: LLM log-probability scoring labels over 97\% of claims neutral -- collapsing the RL gradient to zero -- while a calibrated MedNLI classifier scores the same pairs non-degenerately. \textbf{(ii)} Moderate signal beats strong signal on answer quality: a strong proprietary checker triggers a three-step reward-hacking cascade -- ultra-short answers, search avoidance, language collapse -- so a moderate-signal local classifier trains a higher-quality model (\textbf{+12\% BERTScore over zero-shot, no GPT dependency}). \textbf{(iii)} Signal strength is policy-dependent: the same checker registers as moderate on one policy but strong on another without triggering the cascade end-state. We frame these as boundary conditions for verifier-as-reward systems.

</details>


### [406] [AI-Assisted Systematization for Evaluating GenAI Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26001)
*Dhruv Agarwal,Emily Sheng,Chad Atalla,Jean Garcia-Gathright,Hussein Mozannar,Hannah Washington,Alexandra Chouldechova,Solon Barocas,Hanna Wallach*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文针对生成式AI评估中概念定义模糊的问题，提出通过AI辅助进行概念系统化的方法，引入概念规范（concept spec）和验证工作表，并通过两种AI系统化方法（直接零样本和多智能体）在仇恨言论和数字共情两个概念上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估GenAI系统时，许多核心概念（如推理、公平性、创造力）定义宽泛且存在争议，导致评估目标和结果解释不明确。作者认为这一问题的根源在于缺少"系统化"环节——即从宽泛的背景概念转化为明确、可测量的结构化概念表述。但系统化过程本身认知负担重、资源消耗大，因此需要AI辅助。

Method: （1）引入概念规范（concept spec）作为系统化概念的结构化表示，并设计验证工作表评估质量；（2）开发两种AI辅助系统化方法：直接零样本方法和多智能体方法（后者更贴近人工系统化流程）；（3）选取"基于仇恨的修辞"和"数字共情"两个概念进行实证，从内容效度和信息可恢复性两个维度评估系统化结果。

Result: 两种AI辅助系统化方法均能生成结构化的概念规范，并在内容效度和信息可恢复性上表现出一定的有效性。多智能体方法更贴近人工系统化流程，在概念刻画上可能更具深度。

Conclusion: AI辅助可以支持概念系统化这一认知密集型任务，帮助解决GenAI评估中概念定义模糊的问题。概念规范和验证工作表为系统化过程提供了结构化框架，两种AI方法展示了自动化的可行性。

Abstract: Evaluating generative AI (GenAI) systems is challenging because many targets of evaluation are broad, contested concepts, such as "reasoning," "fairness," or "creativity." When these concepts are left underspecified, it becomes unclear what should be measured or how evaluation results should be interpreted. This problem reflects a missing step: systematization, that is, moving from a broad background concept to an explicit, structured account of the concept in measurable terms. To help address the fact that systematization is cognitively demanding and resource-intensive, we investigate whether AI assistance can support this process. To enable AI-assisted systematization and assess its quality, we introduce a structured representation of a systematized concept, a concept spec, and a validation worksheet. We then develop two AI-assisted systematizers: a direct, zero-shot approach and a multi-agent approach that more closely mirrors manual systematization approaches from existing literature. We use these systematizers to produce concept specs for two concepts -- hate-based rhetoric and digital empathy -- and evaluate resulting concept specs on content validity and information recoverability.

</details>


### [407] [Forgotten Words: Benchmarking NeoBERT for Dementia Detection in Low-Resource Conversational Filipino and English Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26007)
*Rez Samantha Z. Floresca,Edric Castel C. Hao,Hannah Grachiella Buñales,Chelsea Dominique E. Temprosa,Georgianna Z. Reyes,Kervin Gabriel L. Chua*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文首次系统评估了基于Transformer的菲律宾语-英语代码混合语音痴呆症检测，发现双语微调可消除跨语言性能下降（Macro-F1达0.97），而领域内性能无法跨语言迁移，表明多语言临床NLP性能主要由训练时的语言覆盖驱动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有痴呆症检测NLP系统以英语为中心，而菲律宾语-英语代码混合场景下尚无相关工作，亟需填补这一空白。

Method: 构建4,000份DementiaBank平行双语数据集（含人工菲律宾语翻译），评估五种模型（TF-IDF+LogReg、BERT、NeoBERT、XLM-R、RoBERTa-Tagalog）在单语、零样本跨语言和双语微调三种设置下的表现。

Result: 英语训练的BERT迁移到菲律宾语时Macro-F1降至0.455；双语微调使所有Transformer模型收敛至Macro-F1=0.969-0.973，消除跨语言退化。

Conclusion: 多语言临床NLP性能主要取决于训练时的语言覆盖范围，而非模型规模或架构先进性；双语微调是解决跨语言迁移退化的有效策略。

Abstract: Dementia detection from spontaneous speech offers a scalable approach to cognitive screening, yet NLP systems remain predominantly English-centric. This limitation is especially acute in the Philippines, where Filipino-English code-switching is pervasive and no prior work has addressed NLP-based dementia detection. We present the first systematic evaluation of transformer-based dementia detection in Filipino speech and the first assessment of NeoBERT in a clinical NLP setting. To separate language from domain effects, we construct a parallel bilingual dataset of 4,000 DementiaBank-derived transcripts, with Filipino translations produced manually to preserve discourse-level markers of cognitive decline. We evaluate five model families, TF-IDF + LogReg, BERT, NeoBERT, XLM-R, and RoBERTa-Tagalog, under monolingual, zero-shot cross-lingual, and bilingual fine-tuning settings. We find that in-domain performance does not transfer across languages, with English-trained BERT dropping to Macro-F1 = 0.455 on Filipino, and that architectural modernization alone does not improve robustness. Bilingual fine-tuning, however, eliminates cross-lingual degradation across all transformer models, converging to Macro-F1 = 0.969-0.973. These results suggest that multilingual clinical NLP performance is driven primarily by linguistic coverage during training rather than model scale or architecture.

</details>


### [408] [Peak-Then-Collapse and the Four Interface Channels of Knowledge-Graph Tool Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26037)
*Tianda Sun,Dimitar Kazakov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文研究RLVR工具使用配方（GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct）在最小知识图谱工具API（Freebase导航动词+Complex WebQuestions）上的表现，发现工具接地回答率出现“先峰值后崩溃”的规律模式，并论证了接口反馈（interface feedback）是关键差异——Freebase的空结果[]缺乏自然语言信号，剥离后暴露了同族奖励设计无法修复的退化机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索标准RLVR工具使用配方（GRPO）在知识图谱工具API上的表现，特别是当API反馈缺乏自然语言信号时（如Freebase的空结果[] vs Python traceback），模型是否会表现出不同的行为模式。

Method: 使用GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct，在最小Freebase知识图谱工具API（四个导航动词）上训练，使用自我可验证检索奖励；测试7种奖励设计；进行直接oracle消融实验（注入黄金关系）；尝试单次自我蒸馏作为缓解方案，并在7B和14B规模上测试。

Result: 工具接地回答率从3.8%升至9.6%（250步），然后在50步窗口内崩溃至0%（四种子验证）；7种奖励设计均存在四种反复失败模式；注入黄金关系仅提升0.20pp EM；95.4%的检索依赖错误是检索-组合失败而非答案提取失败；单次自我蒸馏达到40.0% EM（7B），但扩展到14B仅提升0.25pp EM。

Conclusion: 接口反馈（interface feedback）是RLVR工具使用的关键瓶颈：缺乏自然语言信号的API（如Freebase空结果）会导致同族奖励设计无法修复的“峰值后崩溃”退化模式；该问题似乎是接口绑定的（interface-bound），在7B-14B范围内容量不变，初始化影响极小。

Abstract: We test the standard RLVR tool-use recipe -- GRPO on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct -- on a deliberately minimal knowledge-graph tool API: four Freebase navigation verbs over Complex WebQuestions. Under a self-verifiable retrieval reward, the policy's tool-grounded answer rate climbs from $3.8\%$ to $9.6\%$ over 250 steps, then collapses to $0\%$ within a single 50-step window -- a \emph{peak-then-collapse} pattern replicated across four seeds. Across seven reward designs, we find four recurring failure modes: adding denser or more targeted proxy rewards shifts the failure mode rather than eliminating it. We argue that a key difference from Python interpreters, web search, and JSON APIs is interface feedback: their failures often leak natural-language signal the model saw in pretraining. A Python traceback names the failing line; an empty Freebase result \texttt{[]} does not. Stripping away that surface exposes a degradation regime that same-family reward redesigns do not fix. A direct oracle ablation rules out relation selection: injecting gold relations at every retrieval call lifts exact-match accuracy by only $+0.20$~pp, and $95.4\%$ of retrieval-dependent errors are retrieval-composition failures rather than answer-extraction failures. As a mitigation, one-iteration self-distillation reaches $40.0\%$ EM at 7B and is capacity-invariant: doubling capacity to 14B improves EM by only $0.25$~pp, and initialization barely matters -- the ceiling appears interface-bound within the 7B--14B range tested.

</details>


### [409] [Confidence and Calibration of Activation Oracles for Reliable Interpretation of Language Model Internals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26045)
*Federico Torrielli,Peter Schneider-Kamp,Lukas Galke Poech*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究了激活预言机（activation oracles）的不确定性量化问题，发现bootstrap模式频率是校准最好的置信度估计方法（ECE 5.7%），而log-prob基线可作为低成本快速筛选信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 激活预言机在可解释性上表现良好，但其自然语言输出的不确定性量化（UQ）尚未得到充分研究。

Method: 在6个不同方法中估计激活预言机的置信度，每个预言机测试6,000个样本（变化verbalizer和上下文提示），评估校准质量。

Result: bootstrap模式频率校准最佳（ECE 5.7% vs. 25.5% log-prob在Qwen3-8B上；10.3% vs. 13.1%在Qwen3.6-27B上），log-prob基线可作为低成本快速筛选信号。

Conclusion: bootstrap模式频率是激活预言机置信度估计的最佳校准方法，log-prob基线在成本可控下可作为快速筛选手段。

Abstract: Activation oracles aim to make the activations of other models legible to humans and yield promising results compared to white-box interpretability techniques. However, uncertainty quantification (UQ) for the natural-language outputs of such activation oracles is so far understudied. Here, we investigate 6 different methods for estimating the confidence of activation oracles and evaluate how well-calibrated their confidence scores are. Our experiments on 6,000 samples per oracle (varying verbalizer and context prompts) reveal that bootstrap mode frequency is the best-calibrated method among those tested (ECE 5.7% vs. 25.5% for the answer-word log-probability on Qwen3-8B; 10.3% vs. 13.1% on Qwen3.6-27B), and that the log-prob baseline can serve as a fast triage signal at a fraction of the cost.
  Code and the patched trainer are available at https://github.com/federicotorrielli/probabilistic_activation_oracles.

</details>


### [410] [When Gradients Collide: Failure Modes of Multi-Objective Prompt Optimization for LLM Judges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26046)
*Parth Darshan,Abhishek Divekar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究文本梯度优化器在多目标场景下的分解模式，发现梯度稀释和指令干扰两种失败模式导致多数配置无法改进初始提示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本梯度方法仅支持单一评估标准，而实际应用常需同时优化多个标准。多任务学习的冲突解决工具（如PCGrad）不适用于文本梯度，因此需要探索多目标文本梯度优化的可行方案。

Method: 设计五种文本梯度优化器的分解模式，通过控制损失、梯度和优化器LLM之间跨任务信息的共享程度进行实验。对比10种配置下的优化效果。

Result: 1) 10种配置中有6种无法改进初始提示；2) 当梯度LLM联合处理多个标准时，梯度特异性下降59%（从9.0降至3.7）；3) 简单合并任务指令导致Spearman rho下降5.3%。

Conclusion: 识别出两种失败模式：优化时的梯度稀释和推理时的指令干扰，这约束了使用文本反馈进行多目标评判定制时的设计空间。

Abstract: Customizing an LLM judge to a specific task or domain often involves optimizing its prompt across multiple evaluation criteria simultaneously. Textual gradient methods automate this for a single judge criterion, however they produce natural-language critiques, not numerical vectors. Thus, the conflict-resolution toolkit of multi-task learning (PCGrad, MGDA) doesn't apply to the multi-objective textual gradient setting. We test five decomposition modes of textual gradient optimizers by varying how much cross-task information the loss, gradient and optimizer LLMs share. In 6 of 10 configurations, we observe that optimization never improves over the initial prompt. Gradient specificity drops by 59% (from 9.0 to 3.7) when the gradient LLM processes multiple criteria jointly. Separately, we observe that naively combining per-task instructions into a single prompt degrades Spearman's rho by -5.3%. These results identify two separable failure modes: optimization-time gradient dilution and inference-time instruction interference, which together constrain the design space for multi-objective judge customization using textual feedback.

</details>


### [411] [WhoSaidIt: Human-LLM Collaborative Annotation for Text-Based Multilingual Speaker-Attribute Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26070)
*Lingyu Gao,Will Monroe,David Smith,Meghan Jemison,Jackie Lee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出人-大语言模型协作的重标注框架，用于在多语言场景下稳定说话人属性标签，并构建了涵盖9种属性的WhoSaidIt多语言数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多语言环境下，从文本中标注说话人属性存在歧义性，且人口统计学和社会线索隐晦且文化差异大，亟需一种资源受限下能提升标注稳定性的方法。

Method: 提出人-LLM协作重标注框架：先从含噪语料出发，通过迭代交互让LLM向专家呈现反复出现的标注理由；再采用分歧聚焦采样进行定向重标注，最终构建WhoSaidIt数据集。

Result: 量化了原始标注与修订标注之间的分歧；评估了最新LLM的性能；分析了显式理由对模型行为的影响；揭示了跨语言标注决策的显著差异。

Conclusion: 多语言说话人属性标注存在显著跨语言差异；LLM在此任务上既有优势也有局限；人机协作框架能有效提升标注稳定性。

Abstract: Annotating speaker attributes from text is inherently ambiguous, particularly in multilingual settings where demographic and social cues are implicit and culturally variable. We propose a human-large language model (LLM) collaborative re-annotation framework for stabilizing multilingual speaker-attribute labels under practical resource constraints. Starting from a noisy corpus, we use LLMs to surface recurring annotation rationales through iterative interaction with experts, and apply disagreement-focused sampling for targeted re-annotation. Using this framework, we construct WhoSaidIt, a multilingual dataset covering nine speaker-attribute labels. We quantify divergence between original and revised annotations, benchmark recent LLMs, and analyze the effect of explicit rationales on model behavior. Our results reveal substantial cross-lingual differences in annotation decisions and demonstrate both the strengths and limitations of LLMs in speaker-attribute classification.

</details>


### [412] [StakeBench: Evaluating Language Understanding Grounded in Market Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26074)
*Yunhua Pei,Jingyu Hu,Yiwei Shi,Hongnan Ma,Weiru Liu,John Cartlidge*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出StakeBench，一个基于市场承诺的金融NLP评估框架，通过预测市场中的可观测行为数据（而非人工标注）来评估语言模型。实验表明，15个LLM在基础任务上表现一般（定向准确率0.506-0.599），在高级任务上存在结构性失败，模型规模、金融微调均无显著提升效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有金融NLP基准依赖外部标注，衡量的是语言被感知的方式而非说话者在市场中实际承诺的内容。作者希望构建一个基于真实市场行为的评估框架，用可观测的市场数据替代人工标注，更客观地衡量模型对金融语言的理解能力。

Method: StakeBench收集了来自Polymarket和Manifold两个预测市场的560,876条评论、2,261个已结算市场，链接到验证后的头寸、交易行为和市场赔率数据。设计了四个诊断任务：检测市场承诺、识别揭示方向、预测未来行为、集体赔率预测。提出三个承诺感知指标，并进行了有效性审计。

Result: 15个LLM在定向准确率上表现从0.506到0.599不等。10/15的模型在未来行动预测任务中塌缩到1-2个标签上。无模型在集体赔率预测上优于朴素基线。模型规模与性能无相关，金融领域微调无提升，平台激励显著影响高阶结果。

Conclusion: 当前LLM在基于市场承诺的金融语言理解上存在显著局限，尤其是在预测未来行为和集体赔率预测等高级任务上存在结构性失败。这表明需要更好的方法使语言模型能够从市场承诺信号中学习，而非仅依赖表面情感。

Abstract: Existing financial NLP benchmarks often rely on labels supplied by outside observers, measuring how language is perceived rather than what speakers have committed to in the market. We introduce StakeBench, an evaluation framework for language understanding grounded in market commitment. StakeBench links 560,876 comments from 2,261 resolved markets to verified position, action, and market-odds records across Polymarket and Manifold. Supervision is derived from observable market behavior. Position sides, post-comment trading actions, and market-odds trajectories replace human annotation. Four diagnostic tasks test whether models detect market commitment, identify the revealed side, anticipate future action, and perform collective odds projection. Three commitment-aware metrics measure alignment with revealed preferences rather than perceived sentiment. Validity audits and explicit interpretation boundaries help distinguish observable commitment signals from latent belief and causal market-odds impact. Across 15 LLMs and 18 topics and platform settings, models partially recover position-side signals, with Directed Accuracy from 0.506 to 0.599, but show structural failures on later tasks. Ten of the fifteen models collapse to one or two action labels in future action anticipation, and no model consistently improves on the naive odds-direction baseline in collective odds projection. Model scale is not correlated with performance, finance-domain tuning does not improve revealed-side identification, and platform incentives strongly shape higher-order results. StakeBench is packaged with evaluation code and dataset under CC-BY 4.0.

</details>


### [413] [Automated Benchmark Auditing for AI Agents and Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26079)
*Junlin Wang,Federico Bianchi,Shang Zhu,Fan Nie,Yongchan Kwon,Bhuwan Dhingra,James Zou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA)框架，系统审计了168个基准测试中的问题，发现超过25.7%的任务存在缺陷，修复后模型排名发生变化且性能提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI基准测试复杂度超出传统验证方法，领域专家编写的任务常包含隐含假设、不完整的环境规范和脆弱的评估逻辑，人工标注无法可靠发现这些问题。

Method: 提出ABA（Auto Benchmark Audit）智能体框架，系统审计单个基准测试任务，自动发现隐藏环境依赖、规范缺口和有限的评分逻辑等问题。

Result: 在168个基准测试中发现超过25.7%的任务存在关键问题，包括模糊的任务设计、执行环境冲突和错误的地面真相。修复这些问题后，SWE-bench Verified和Terminal-Bench 2的平均性能分别提升9.9%和9.6%，模型排名发生改变。

Conclusion: 有问题的任务会严重扭曲对智能体和LLM的能力评估，ABA框架可以自动发现这些缺陷；同时开源了该工具和任务注释以支持前沿基准测试的发展。

Abstract: Modern AI benchmarks operate at a complexity that outpaces traditional verification methods. Tasks authored by domain experts often contain implicit assumptions, incomplete environment specifications, and brittle evaluation logic that human annotation cannot reliably catch. We introduce Auto Benchmark Audit (ABA), an agentic framework that systematically audits individual benchmark tasks, uncovering issues such as hidden environment dependencies, specification gaps, and limited grading logic. We run ABA on a collection of frontier LLM benchmarks and previous NeurIPS publications, totaling 168 benchmarks across nine domains. Across this corpus, ABA identifies critical issues including ambiguous task design, execution environment conflicts, and incorrect ground truths in over 25.7% of the evaluated tasks. The precision of these automated audits is validated by expert review and independent third-party reports such as upstream PRs. Crucially, we demonstrate that these problematic tasks severely distorts capability assessments for agents and LLMs: filtering out these tasks with issues shifts model rankings and increases average performance on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal-Bench 2 by 9.9% and 9.6%, respectively. We release the agentic tool and all task annotations to support the future development of frontier benchmarks.

</details>


### [414] [Language Models Need Sleep](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26099)
*Sangyun Lee,Sean McLeish,Tom Goldstein,Giulia Fanti*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一种类似睡眠的巩固机制，让Transformer模型周期性地将上下文转化为持久快速权重并清除KV缓存，通过离线循环更新SSM块中的快速权重，从而在长上下文任务中提升性能，实验显示该方法在合成任务和数学推理任务上均优于普通Transformer和SSM混合模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer的注意力机制在长上下文任务中扩展性差，计算复杂度随上下文长度平方增长，导致长序列处理效率低下。

Method: 提出睡眠式巩固机制：模型周期性地将最近上下文转化为持久快速权重，清除KV缓存；在睡眠阶段执行N次离线循环，通过学习到的局部规则更新SSM块中的快速权重；推理时睡眠阶段的计算不影响唤醒时预测的延迟。

Result: 在细胞自动机、多跳图检索等合成任务以及数学推理任务上，该方法优于普通Transformer和SSM-注意力混合模型；增加睡眠时长N能提升性能，尤其是在需要更深层推理的样本上提升最大。

Conclusion: 睡眠式巩固机制能有效提升Transformer在长上下文任务上的表现，将计算从在线推理转移到离线阶段，在保持低延迟的同时增强模型对深层推理任务的处理能力。

Abstract: Transformer-based large language models are increasingly used for long-horizon tasks; however, their attention mechanism scales poorly with context length. To handle this, we study a sleep-like consolidation mechanism in which a model periodically converts recent context into persistent fast weights before clearing its key-value cache. During sleep, the model performs $N$ offline recurrent passes over the accumulated context and updates the fast weights in its state-space model (SSM) blocks through a learned local rule. During inference, this shifts extra computation to sleep while preserving the latency of wake-time prediction. We test our method on controlled synthetic tasks, including cellular automata and multi-hop graph retrieval, as well as a realistic math reasoning task, on which a regular transformer as well as SSM-attention hybrid models fail. We then show that increasing sleep duration $N$ for our models improves performance, with the largest gains on examples that require deeper reasoning.

</details>


### [415] [Tokenizer Fertility and Zero-Shot Performance of Foundation Models on Ukrainian Legal Text: A Comparative Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.14890)
*Volodymyr Ovcharov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文研究了七个基础模型在乌克兰法律文本上的分词器生育率（差异达1.6倍）和零样本性能，发现Qwen 3比Llama多消耗60% tokens，NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B)以更低成本超越Mistral Large 3，少样本学习性能下降高达26个百分点，战时法律语言导致分类器性能下降27.9个百分点。发布包含14,452份法院判决的公开数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分词器生育率（tokenizer fertility）这一成本关键维度在模型选择实践中被忽视，且乌克兰语在法律NLP基准测试中缺失。

Method: 对七个模型（来自五个提供商）在273份经过验证的乌克兰法院判决上进行基准测试，测量分词器生育率和三项任务的零样本性能。进行少样本消融实验和跨时间泛化实验（2008-2026年数据）。

Result: (1) Qwen 3比Llama多消耗60% tokens；(2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B)以三分之一的API成本超越Mistral Large 3；(3) 少样本提示导致性能下降最高26个百分点；(4) 战时决策导致分类器性能下降27.9个百分点，新模型向后迁移能力强但旧模型在战时法律语言上完全失败。

Conclusion: 分词器分析应先于模型选择，零样本比少样本更可靠地适用于形态丰富的语言。发布包含14,452份法院判决（2008-2026年）的公开数据集以支持可重复性。

Abstract: Tokenizer fertility varies 1.6x across foundation models on Ukrainian legal text, yet this cost-critical dimension is absent from model selection practice. We benchmark seven models from five providers on 273 validated court decisions from Ukraine's state registry (EDRSR), measuring tokenizer fertility and zero-shot performance on three tasks. Four findings emerge. (1) Qwen 3 models consume 60% more tokens than Llama-family models on identical input, making tokenizer analysis a prerequisite for cost-efficient deployment. (2) NVIDIA Nemotron Super 3 (120B) achieves the highest composite score (83.1), outperforming Mistral Large 3 (5.6x more total parameters) at one-third the API cost model scale is a poor proxy for domain performance. (3) Few-shot prompting degrades performance by up to 26 percentage points; stratified and prompt-sensitivity ablations confirm this is intrinsic to Ukrainian-language demonstrations, not an artifact of example selection. (4) A cross-temporal generalization experiment reveals that classifiers trained on pre-war court ecisions (2008-2013) lose 27.9 percentage points when applied to full-scale invasion era decisions (2022-2026), with a pronounced forward-backward asymmetry: newer models transfer backward (+14.6 pp above forward transfer), but older models fail catastrophically on wartime legal language. For practitioners: tokenizer analysis should precede model selection, and zero-shot is a more reliable default than few-shot for morphologically rich languages. To support reproducibility and address the absence of Ukrainian from legal NLP benchmarks, we release a public dataset of 14,452 court decisions spanning 2008-2026, annotated with seven outcome labels across three temporal epochs that capture the impact of armed conflict on judicial proceedings.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [416] [In Search of the Ingredients of Open-Endedness: Replicating Picbreeder with Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23908)
*Sam Earle,Kay Arulkumaran,Andrew Dai,Akarsh Kumar,Julian Togelius,Sebastian Risi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文研究AI驱动助手（特别是视觉语言模型VLM）能否像人类一样进行开放式发现。通过复现人类驱动的图像进化平台Picbreeder，用VLM替代人类用户，发现AI生成结果与人类基线存在明显差异，并探索了引入探索性噪声、行为多样性和记忆机制对结果的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI助手在科学、技术和创意生产方面发展迅速，但人类创意过程的一个核心特征是"开放式"——能持续产生新颖且有意义的成果。作者希望探究AI代理是否具备这种能力，即在无引导的情况下进行富有成果的发现。

Method: 复现Picbreeder平台，将原有的人类用户替换为前沿视觉语言模型（VLM），通过交互式进化小神经网络生成图像。同时引入三种干预因素：探索性噪声、代理间的行为多样性、以及对过去行动的记忆（叙事动量），以分析造成AI与人类输出差异的原因。

Result: AI系统与人类基线在输出上存在明显的定性差异。通过系统发育复杂度、视觉和语义显著性及新颖性等指标对这些差异进行了量化表征。

Conclusion: 当前VLM在开放式发现能力上与人类存在显著差距，但引入探索性噪声、行为多样性和记忆机制可能是缩小这一差距的潜在方向。

Abstract: We are in the midst of large-scale industrial and academic efforts to automate the processes of scientific, technological and creative production through AI-driven assistants. Historically, a fundamental property of these processes in their human form has been their open-endedness: their capacity for generating a seemingly endless supply of novel and meaningful new forms. Do artificial agents have any capacity for such fruitful unguided discovery? To answer this question, we turn to Picbreeder, the canonical exemplar of human-driven open-ended search, in which users collaboratively generated a diverse library of images through interactive evolution of small neural networks. We replicate Picbreeder, replacing human users with frontier Vision Language Models (VLMs). We observe clear qualitative differences between the output of our system and the historical human baseline, and attempt to characterize them using metrics of phylogenetic complexity and visual and semantic salience and novelty. In an effort to identify some of the causal factors contributing these differences, we study the addition of exploratory noise to the agents' selection process, of behavioral diversity between agents, and of narrative momentum in the form of memory of past actions. We make our code available at https://github.com/smearle/picbreeder-vlm.

</details>


### [417] [Confidence Calibration in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23909)
*Noam Michael,Daniel BenShushan,Jacob Bien,Don A. Moore*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 这篇论文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在不同任务上的校准情况，发现它们像人类一样过于自信——在困难任务上过度自信，在简单任务上反而信心不足。作者开发了LifeEval测试来评估模型在不同难度水平上的校准表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大型语言模型（LLMs）在不同任务上的置信度校准情况，即模型对自己预测的自信程度是否与其实际准确率相匹配。

Method: 通过预先注册的研究，比较LLMs的置信度与准确率，并分析难度效应（hard-easy effect）。开发了LifeEval测试，用于评估模型在不同难度水平上的校准表现。

Result: 当前LLMs的平均置信度高于平均准确率，表现出过度自信。但这种倾向受难度调节：困难任务上过度自信最严重，简单任务上反而明显信心不足。

Conclusion: LLMs的置信度校准存在类似人类的偏差，且具有难度依赖性。LifeEval可作为评估模型校准的有效工具。

Abstract: We investigate the calibration of large language models' (LLMs') confidence across diverse tasks. The results of our preregistered study show that the current crop of LLMs are, like people, too sure they are right: confidence exceeds accuracy, on average. Importantly, however, this tendency is moderated by a powerful hard-easy effect, wherein overconfidence is greatest on difficult tests; by contrast, easy tests actually show substantial underconfidence. We develop LifeEval, a test for evaluating model calibration across levels of difficulty.

</details>


### [418] [How Much Thinking is Enough? Quantifying and Understanding Redundancy in LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23926)
*Zhiyuan Zhai,Xinkai You,Wenjing Yan,Xin Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文量化了推理模型在生成思维链时的冗余度（61%-93%），并证明这种冗余是长度无关奖励的结构性结果，而非模型特定缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理模型虽能解决复杂问题，但产生冗长的思维链带来了延迟、GPU时间和能耗的巨大开销。目前缺乏大规模测量这些冗余程度的实证研究，也缺乏从第一性原理解释其必然性的理论分析。

Method: 形式化定义推理冗余度：正确轨迹中可被截断的最大比例尾部段。在4个前沿推理模型和2个数学基准上大规模量化。进一步通过理论证明，证明冗余是长度无关结果奖励的结构性后果。

Result: 8个（模型，基准）条件下，步骤级冗余度在61%-93%之间，中位数关键前缀在6/8条件下仅为一个步骤。随问题难度增加冗余度下降，但最难的Level-5问题上冗余度仍在46%-85%。

Conclusion: 推理冗余是长度无关奖励的结构性结果，而非模型特定bug。过度思考是当前推理模型训练方式的固有属性，无法通过修补单个模型来消除。

Abstract: Reasoning-capable large language models solve hard problems by emitting long chains of thought, paying heavily in latency, GPU time, and energy. Casual inspection of their traces reveals extensive reformulation, verification, and circular self-reflection, yet how much of this deliberation is actually necessary has never been measured at scale or explained from first principles. This paper closes both gaps.
  We formalise reasoning redundancy directly in terms of the reasoning model itself: the redundancy of a correct trace is the largest fraction of its trailing segmented steps that can be truncated while $π$, forced to terminate thinking and emit a final answer, still produces the correct answer. A large-scale quantification across four frontier reasoning models and two mathematical benchmarks shows that step-level redundancy is consistently high -- between 61% and 93% across the 8 (model, benchmark) conditions we study, with the median critical prefix equal to a single segmented step in six of the eight conditions -- that the finding is robust to the choice of judge family, and that although $ρ$ decreases with problem difficulty on MATH-500, all four models remain substantially redundant ($ρ\in [46\%, 85\%]$) even on the hardest Level-5 problems.
  We then prove that this redundancy is a structural consequence of length-agnostic outcome rewards, not a model-specific artefact: under any such reward, no finite expected stopping time is optimal. The result holds regardless of RL algorithm, base model, data distribution, or whether the policy is obtained via RL or distillation; over-thinking is therefore not a bug to be patched in individual models but a structural property of how current reasoning models are trained. Code: https://github.com/zhiyuanZhai20/how-much-thinking-is-enough

</details>


### [419] [Context: Proactive Goal-Directed Intelligence via Composable Sandboxed Programs, Declarative Wiring, and Structured Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23928)
*Gregory Magarshak*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Context架构，通过预计算上下文、可组合程序沙箱和主动目标状态机三个机制，将被动问答聊天机器人升级为主动驱动任务达成的智能代理，并提供了六个形式化理论证明。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有反应式问答聊天机器人需要用户持续提示才能推进任务，效率低下。作者希望设计一种能主动推进目标的代理架构，减少不必要的LM调用并提升多参与者协作效率。

Method: 1) 编写时上下文组装：通过Groker代理预计算增强类型化属性，上下文块在语义未变时字节一致，实现近100% KV缓存复用。2) 可组合沙箱化智慧程序：LM生成的命令式程序组成受控库，通过类型化流关系声明式绑定到目标类型，执行时无需额外LM调用。3) 主动目标流状态机：通过检查图状态并输出结构化交互内容（选项数组、治理工具、澄清提示）驱动对话走向终止状态。

Result: 提供了六个形式化定理证明：上下文稳定性定理（每次LM调用成本与语义变化率相关）、程序组合正确性定理、声明式焊接可靠性定理、主动主导定理（主动代理在期望步数上弱主导被动代理）、协调开销消除与质量保持定理（帕累托改进）、跨平台投票一致性定理。

Conclusion: Context架构能在减少LM调用、消除协调开销的同时提升任务完成效率，已在开源的Qbix/Safebox/Safebots栈中实现。

Abstract: We present Context, the intelligence layer of the Magarshak Architecture, which replaces reactive query-response chatbots with proactive goal-directed agents that advance shared tasks without waiting for user prompts. The architecture rests on three mutually reinforcing mechanisms. Write-time context assembly precomputes enriched typed attributes via Groker agents, assembling interaction context as a deterministic pure function of graph state; context blocks are byte-identical across turns between semantic changes, enabling near-100% KV-cache reuse. Composable sandboxed wisdom programs form a governed library of LM-generated imperative programs declaratively wired to goal types via typed stream relations, composed via phase ordering, and executed at interaction time without further LM calls. Proactive goal stream state machines drive conversations toward terminal states by inspecting graph state and emitting structured interaction content (option arrays, governance affordances, clarification prompts) without awaiting user input. We prove six formal results: the Context Stability Theorem, bounding per-turn LM cost as a function of semantic change rate; a Program Composition Correctness Theorem; a Declarative Wiring Soundness Theorem; the Proactive Dominance Theorem, proving proactive agents weakly dominate reactive agents on expected turns-to-terminal-state; Coordination Overhead Elimination and Quality Preservation, establishing Pareto improvements in multi-participant goal chats; and a Cross-Platform Vote Consistency Theorem. Implemented in the open-source Qbix / Safebox / Safebots stack.

</details>


### [420] [Toward Reliable Design of LLM-Enabled Agentic Workflows: Optimizing Latency-Reliability-Cost Tradeoffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23929)
*Ya-Ting Yang,Quanyan Zhu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文分析了由大语言模型(LLM)和传统计算模块组成的多智能体工作流中延迟、可靠性和成本之间的基本权衡，提出了性能模型，并推导了顺序工作流下的最优令牌分配策略（水填充策略）和可靠性表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代AI系统越来越依赖由多个交互智能体组成的工作流，其中一些由LLM驱动，另一些由传统计算模块驱动。需要理解在这种异构工作流中延迟、可靠性和成本之间的基本权衡关系。

Method: 为LLM和非LLM智能体分别建立了性能模型，将计算投入与输出质量之间的关系量化；针对LLM智能体，使用参数化指数可靠性函数建模推理和输出令牌的影响；在延迟和成本约束下研究顺序工作流的设计。

Result: 提出了水填充令牌分配策略；以影子价格形式刻画了最优工作流可靠性。

Conclusion: 本文为LLM赋能的智能体工作流提供了系统性的性能分析与优化方法，为在延迟和成本约束下设计高效可靠的多智能体工作流奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: Modern AI systems increasingly rely on workflows composed of multiple interacting agents, some powered by large language models (LLMs) and others by conventional computational modules. This paper analyzes the fundamental tradeoffs between latency, reliability, and cost in LLM-enabled agentic workflows. We introduce performance models for both LLM and non-LLM agents that capture the relationship between computational effort and output quality, incorporating the impact of reasoning and output tokens for LLM agents using a parametric exponential reliability function. Then, we study the design of sequential workflows under latency and cost constraints. Main results include a water-filling token allocation policy and characterizations of optimal workflow reliability in terms of shadow prices.

</details>


### [421] [Quantum Frog: Emergent Cooperation and Difficulty Scaling in a Quantized-Time Cooperative Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23930)
*Saad Mankarious*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一款名为 Quantum Frog 的双人合作游戏，基于创新的“量子化时间”机制——环境仅在玩家行动时推进。通过强化学习分析四个设计问题，发现：在量子化时间下“冲刺策略”最优；添加一个不协调的第二玩家比将交通密度提升六倍更难；合作训练可显著提升成功率（+32-34%）并将回合长度从约90步降至约6步；涌现的合作策略是同步冲刺而非复杂位置协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 作者希望通过 Quantum Frog 游戏设计，利用强化学习作为分析透镜，系统回答四个核心设计问题：难度如何随交通密度变化、最优单智能体策略是什么、独立与协作双智能体之间的合作差距有多大，以及合作激励下会涌现出什么样的联合策略。

Method: 使用五阶段强化学习训练：表格Q学习、Deep Q-Network (DQN)、独立DQN (IDQN)、带集中式评论家的多智能体PPO (MAPPO)。在1到6辆车的交通密度下进行评估，分析单智能体和双智能体（独立/合作）的表现。

Result: (i) 量子化时间机制使“冲刺策略”（每一步直接向上移动）成为通用最优策略；(ii) 添加一个不协调的第二玩家比将单专家玩家的交通密度提升六倍更难；(iii) 合作训练相比独立智能体可提升32-34个百分点的联合成功率，并将回合长度从约90步降至约6步；(iv) 涌现的合作策略是同步冲刺，而非复杂的位置协调。

Conclusion: 量子化时间机制从根本上改变了游戏的最优策略，共享激励足以在时间关键型合作任务中使智能体对齐，无需复杂的协调机制。这些发现为 Quantum Frog 的商业设计提供了具体的实证指导，并为环境机制如何塑造多智能体学习动力学提供了更广泛见解。

Abstract: We introduce \emph{Quantum Frog}, a two-player cooperative game built on a novel \emph{quantized-time} mechanic in which the environment advances only when a player acts. Inspired by the classic arcade game Frogger, Quantum Frog requires two frogs to cross an 8$\times$8 grid of traffic and reach the far side together. We use reinforcement learning (RL) as an analytical lens to answer four design questions: (1) how does game difficulty scale with traffic density, (2) what is the optimal single-agent policy and why, (3) how large is the cooperation gap between independent and cooperative two-agent play, and (4) what joint strategy emerges when agents are incentivised to cooperate? We train agents through five escalating stages, Tabular Q-Learning, Deep Q-Network (\DQN), Independent \DQN~(\IDQN), and Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimisation (\MAPPO\ with a centralised critic), evaluating each against traffic densities of one to six cars. Our key findings are: (i) the quantized-time mechanic makes a \emph{rush strategy} (moving directly upward at every step) universally optimal, as time exposure to traffic is minimised; (ii) adding an uncoordinated second player is harder than sextupling the traffic for a single expert player; (iii) cooperative training recovers +32--34 percentage points of joint success rate relative to independent agents and reduces episode length from $\sim$90 to $\sim$6 steps; and (iv) the emergent cooperative strategy is synchronised rushing, not complex positional coordination, illustrating that shared incentives alone suffice to align agents in time-critical cooperative tasks. These findings provide concrete, empirically grounded guidance for the commercial design of Quantum Frog and offer broader insights into the role of environment mechanics in shaping multi-agent learning dynamics.

</details>


### [422] [BODHI: Precise OS Kernel Specification Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23931)
*Zhiming Chang,Ziyang Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出BODHI方法，通过结构化C-to-Python翻译指南（覆盖15类领域特定模式）增强大语言模型，在OSV-Bench基准上将形式化规约生成的Pass@1从55.10%提升至96.73%（Claude Opus 4.6 + BODHI），提升幅度达11%-32%，适用于多种模型架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 操作系统内核系统调用的形式化规约需要精确规范，手工编写需要深厚的领域知识，因此需要利用LLM自动化生成过程。然而现有方法在OSV-Bench基准上的Pass@1仅有55.10%，性能不佳。

Method: 提出BODHI领域知识提示方法，在标准少样本提示基础上增加结构化C-to-Python翻译指南，涵盖15类领域特定翻译模式。受结构化思维链启发，按关注点分离原则组织翻译，将前置条件提取和后置条件生成作为不同类别处理。

Result: 在6家提供商的9个模型（覆盖密集、混合专家和推理架构）上测试，BODHI使每个模型均获得提升（+11%至+32%）。最佳配置Claude Opus 4.6 + BODHI达到96.73% Pass@1，显著降低语法和语义错误。

Conclusion: 领域知识注入是一种模型无关的技术，能有效弥合通用代码生成与形式化规约合成之间的差距。该方法对具有足够指令跟随能力的模型效果最为显著。

Abstract: The formal verification of operating system kernels requires precise specifications that capture the intended behavior of system calls. Writing these specifications manually demands deep domain expertise, motivating the use of large language models (LLMs) to automate the process. However, in OSV-Bench, a benchmark of 245 specification generation tasks derived from the Hyperkernel OS kernel, the best reported Pass@1 is 55.10%. We propose a domain knowledge prompting method (BODHI), which augments the standard few-shot prompt with a structured C-to-Python translation guide covering 15 categories of domain-specific translation patterns. Inspired by Structured Chain-of-Thought (SCoT) prompting, the guide organizes translation by separation of concerns, addressing pre-condition extraction and post-condition generation as distinct categories. Evaluated on nine models from six providers (Anthropic, Mistral, Amazon, DeepSeek, Meta, Alibaba), covering dense, mixture-of-experts and reasoning architectures, BODHI improves every model tested, with gains ranging from +11% to +32%. The best configuration (Claude Opus 4.6 + BODHI) reaches 96.73% Pass@1. BODHI reduces both syntax and semantic errors, with the strongest effect on models that have sufficient instruction-following capability to utilize structured reference material. These results demonstrate that domain knowledge injection is a model-agnostic technique that substantially bridges the gap between general-purpose code generation and formal specification synthesis.

</details>


### [423] [When Correct Beliefs Collapse: Epistemic Resilience of LLMs under Clinical Pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23932)
*Boyu Xiao,Xiuqi Tian,Xuwen Song,Haochun Wang,Guanchun Song,Sendong Zhao,Bing Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Med-Stress压力测试框架，评估LLM在临床对话中面对逐渐升级压力时的信念稳定性，发现模型存在知识与鲁棒性分离现象；并提出推理时防御RBED和训练时方法R-FT来缓解此问题，其中R-FT几乎完全消除了信念改变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在医学基准测试中表现优异，但在临床对话的多轮交互中容易表现出严重的"谄媚"行为——在逐渐升级的压力下放弃原本正确的诊断，这威胁了临床决策的可靠性。

Method: 提出Med-Stress压力测试框架（用于评估），以及两种缓解方法：推理时的RBED（基于角色的认知防御）和训练时的R-FT（韧性导向的微调，将基于证据的抗压能力内化到模型中）。

Result: 在9个前沿LLM上发现医学知识与鲁棒性之间的明显分离：高初始诊断能力不代表高信念稳定性，存在较大的知识-鲁棒性差距。R-FT几乎完全消除了信念改变，显著提升了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 医学知识与对话鲁棒性是两种独立的能力，需要针对性提升。训练时内化抗压能力的R-FT是应对临床对话中谄媚行为的有效方法。

Abstract: Despite strong medical benchmark accuracy, LLMs can exhibit severe multi-turn sycophancy in clinical dialogue, abandoning initial correct diagnosis under escalating pressure. We propose \textbf{\textsc{Med-Stress}}, a targeted stress test framework that evaluates belief stability under escalating pressure. Across nine frontier large language models (LLMs), we find a clear dissociation between medical knowledge and robustness: high initial diagnostic capability does not imply high belief stability, yielding large knowledge-robustness gaps for several LLMs. To mitigate this failure mode, we propose a lightweight inference-time defense, \textbf{\texttt{RBED}} (\textbf{R}ole-\textbf{B}ased \textbf{E}pistemic \textbf{D}efense), and \textbf{\texttt{R-FT}} (\textbf{R}esilience-oriented \textbf{F}ine-\textbf{T}uning), a training-time approach that internalizes evidence-based resistance to pressure. Experiments show that \textbf{\texttt{R-FT}} nearly eliminates belief change and substantially improves robustness.

</details>


### [424] [Practical Quantum CIM Empowerment via All-Domestic-Core Agentic Large Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23934)
*Wang Rui,Lu Diannan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本研究将飞秒激光泵浦的相干伊辛机（CIM）与基于LLM的智能代理系统（LangGraph/LangChain框架）相结合，实现了全自主国产大模型+国产CIM硬件的量子计算实用化赋能，并发现了代理辅助量子计算迭代知识可反向增强代理求解能力的新范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量子计算设备虽能解决NP完全问题，但建模复杂（非专家难以使用）且约束权重迭代过程繁琐（专家也需耗费大量精力），亟需自动化、智能化的建模方法降低使用门槛。

Method: 将飞秒激光泵浦的CIM与LLM驱动的代理系统集成，基于LangGraph和LangChain框架实现QUBO/Ising模型校准、约束权重决策迭代、文献方案快速验证等任务，并全部依赖国产大模型+国产CIM硬件。

Result: LLM能有效执行建模任务（校准、权重迭代、文献验证），且全流程基于国产大模型和国产CIM硬件实现，证明了技术的可落地性；同时发现代理辅助量子计算迭代中积累的知识可反向增强代理自身的求解能力。

Conclusion: 成功实现了大模型与量子计算的鲁棒技术集成，为后续研究奠定基础；揭示了大模型与量子计算两个前沿领域目前仍存在的挑战；意外发现了一个新范式——代理辅助量子计算积累的知识可循环增强代理能力。

Abstract: Quantum computing devices are recognized as powerful tools for solving NP-complete problems. However, the intricacy of their modeling presents notable barriers for non-specialists, while the tedious iteration of constraint weights and modeling methodologies also consumes substantial effort on the part of experts. To address these challenges, this study integrates a femtosecond laser-pumped Coherent Ising Machine (CIM) with an LLM-driven agentic system by leveraging the LangGraph and LangChain frameworks. Comprehensive investigations demonstrate that large language models (LLMs) can effectively perform such tasks in modeling as QUBO/Ising model calibration, constraint weight decision iteration and rapid validation of literature-reported schemes. Notably, all these tasks can be fully implemented based on domestic large models, combined with domestically developed CIM hardware, we truly achieve the practical empowerment of quantum CIM that fully relies on all-domestic agentic large models and hardware. This work successfully realizes robust technological integration, laying a solid foundation for subsequent research. Nevertheless, it also identifies the persisting challenges in the two cutting-edge fields of large models and quantum computing at the current stage. Encouragingly, we unexpectedly discover a promising new paradigm where accumulated knowledge from agent-assisted quantum computing iterations reciprocally enhances the agent's own problem-solving capability, thereby addressing these challenges.

</details>


### [425] [Operationalizing Reconstructive Authority: Runtime Construction, Dependency Resolution, and Execution Gating in Autonomous Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23935)
*Marcelo Fernandez - TraslaIA*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种运行时执行模型，通过引入"暂停"状态和执行恢复循环，确保只有在当前状态下可构建权威时才能执行动作，从而保障安全性和条件活性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主代理系统仅在决策时检查权限，但执行时权限可能已失效。需要一种运行时机制来确保动作执行时权限仍然有效。

Method: 提出三态执行模型（允许/拒绝/暂停），引入包含IML漂移检测和ACP执行控制的恢复循环，在权限不可构建时暂停执行、获取缺失信息并重新尝试。

Result: 该模型保证安全性（无动作在无权限时执行）和条件活性（当权限变量可观测时恢复执行）。

Conclusion: 将可重构权威操作化为运行时执行机制，提供了在真实系统中应用RAM所需的执行语义。

Abstract: Autonomous agent systems fail not only due to incorrect decisions, but due to executing decisions whose authority no longer holds at runtime. Prior work defined Reconstructive Authority (RAM) as a condition for valid execution: actions are permitted only if authority can be constructed from current state.
  This paper addresses enforcement at runtime: how to enforce this condition in a running system.
  We introduce a runtime execution model in which authority is evaluated at action time and execution is conditioned on its constructibility. This extends the execution state space beyond admit/deny with a third state, halt, representing cases where authority is undefined due to incomplete or uncertain observability.
  We define a concrete execution protocol including dynamic dependency resolution, authority reconstruction, and explicit decision semantics. We further introduce a Recovery Loop that integrates drift detection (IML) with execution control (ACP), allowing the system to suspend execution, acquire missing information, and re-attempt authority reconstruction.
  We show that this model guarantees safety -- no action is executed without constructible authority -- and conditional liveness: execution resumes when authority-defining variables become observable.
  This work operationalizes reconstructive authority as a runtime enforcement mechanism, providing the execution semantics required to apply RAM in real systems.

</details>


### [426] [Fuzzy, Neutrosophic, and Uncertain Graph Theory: Properties and Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23936)
*Takaaki Fujita,Florentin Smarandache*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本书对不确定性图论进行了系统综述，以不确定图框架为核心，涵盖了模糊、中智等模型下的基本概念、结构性质、图类与参数，并扩展至有向图、超图、超超图、动态图等，同时探讨了在分子图、决策系统、图神经网络、知识图谱和认知地图中的应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图论研究多针对确定性图，而现实世界中图数据常带有不确定性（如模糊、不完整、不一致等），需要统一的框架来整合和系统化各种不确定性图模型。

Method: 采用系统性综述方法，以不确定图框架为统一视角，梳理和分类已有不确定性图模型（模糊图、中智图等），并介绍扩展结构（不确定有向图、超图、超超图、动态图）及应用领域。

Result: 呈现了一个连贯的不确定性图论知识体系，阐明了不同不确定性图模型之间的关系、能力差异，以及在复杂系统中的应用场景。

Conclusion: 不确定图框架为理解和应用各类不确定性图模型提供了统一视角，有助于推动图论在处理复杂系统中不确定性问题方面的发展。

Abstract: This book presents a comprehensive and systematic survey of graph theory under uncertainty, with particular emphasis on the unifying role of the uncertain graph framework. It reviews fundamental concepts, structural properties, graph classes, and graph parameters within fuzzy, neutrosophic, and related models, while also introducing a wide range of extensions such as uncertain digraphs, hypergraphs, superhypergraphs, and dynamic graphs. In addition to theoretical developments, the book explores practical applications, including uncertain molecular graphs, decision-making systems, graph neural networks, knowledge graphs, and cognitive maps. By organizing diverse uncertainty-aware graph models within a common perspective, this work provides a coherent framework for understanding their relationships, capabilities, and applications in complex systems.

</details>


### [427] [BoxLitE: A Faithful Knowledge Base Embedding Based on Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23937)
*Bruno F. Lourenço,Hesham Morgan,Ana Ozaki,Aleksandar Pavlović,Emanuel Sallinger*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出BoxLitE，一个基于凸优化方法的DL-Lite$^{\mathcal{H}}$知识库嵌入模型，能够将概念映射到凸区域，并证明任何可满足的DL-Lite$^{\mathcal{H}}$知识库都存在具有弱忠实性的BoxLitE嵌入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法虽然将概念映射到向量空间中的凸区域以表示层次结构，但凸性在实际学习任务中很少被充分利用。

Method: 提出BoxLitE模型，将知识库嵌入任务形式化为凸优化问题，利用凸区域表示概念层次，并证明弱忠实性。

Result: 证明了对于任何可满足的DL-Lite$^{\mathcal{H}}$知识库，都存在一个弱忠实模型的BoxLitE嵌入。

Conclusion: BoxLitE能够通过凸优化获得具有忠实性保证的嵌入，为知识库嵌入中的凸性利用提供了理论基础和可行方案。

Abstract: Knowledge base (KB) embeddings aim at combining the capability of classical knowledge graph embeddings to generalize the information present in facts, the ABox, with conceptual knowledge represented in an ontology language, the TBox. Several authors have recently explored the idea of mapping concepts to convex regions in a vector space. This is useful to represent hierarchies, typically present in TBoxes, since more general concepts can be mapped to larger regions, containing those regions associated with more specific concepts. However, the power of convexity is rarely leveraged during the actual learning tasks. Here, we introduce BoxLitE, a KB embedding model for DL-Lite$^{\mathcal{H}}$ that allows for convex optimization. We show that for any satisfiable DL-Lite$^{\mathcal{H}}$ KB, there is a BoxLitE embedding that is a weakly faithful model. As a proof of concept, we show how to formulate the KB embedding task as a convex optimization problem and how to obtain embeddings with such desirable faithfulness properties.

</details>


### [428] [Authority Inversion in LLM-Mediated Ubiquitous Systems: When Models Trust Users Over Sensors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23938)
*Long Zhang,Zi-bo Qin,Wei-neng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 大语言模型在多模态融合中存在"权威反转"现象：数值传感器数据被忽视，自然语言用户主张主导决策。本文提出几何框架、审计指标（CIR/AAI）及推理层干预方法GAC，实验显示传感器信任度极低（AAI=-0.805），GAC将准确率从0-1.6%提升至21.9-27.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当传感器测量值与用户主张冲突时，LLM隐式分配权威的方式未被研究。现有显式融合方法不适用，LLM将权威分配嵌入学习表征中，且表现出严重的格式依赖性：数值数据无法融入模型决策方向，导致自然语言主张主导结果，即"权威反转"现象，这引发了关键可靠性担忧。

Method: 提出上下文整合几何框架，定义两个可计算审计指标：上下文整合比（CIR）和权威对齐指数（AAI）；提出几何权威校准（GAC），一种推理时层级别干预方法，通过理论引导的因果注入抑制不当的用户权威。

Result: 在4个模型（4B-35B参数，三种架构）、4个数据集共576个冲突实例上评估：数值任务中传感器信任度近乎为零（AAI=-0.805, Cohen's d=-2.14），且不受模型容量影响；理论引导的因果注入翻转80.2%的错误决策（随机控制<0.4%）；GAC将HAR准确率从0-1.6%提升至21.9-27.5%，优于提示基线方法。

Conclusion: LLM中介系统中的权威分配必须被显式审计并按应用场景配置，而非隐式交由模型决定。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly fuse heterogeneous inputs in ubiquitous systems. Yet, how LLMs implicitly allocate authority when sensor measurements and user claims conflict remains unexamined, raising critical reliability concerns for deployments where physical sensing must retain priority. Unlike explicit traditional fusion, LLMs bury authority allocation within learned representations. We discover this allocation is severely format-dependent: numerical sensor data fails to integrate into answer-relevant model directions, allowing natural-language claims to dominate the final decision, a phenomenon we term \textbf{Authority Inversion}.To diagnose and mitigate this, we develop a geometric framework of context integration, introduce two computable audit metrics, specifically the Context Integration Ratio (CIR) and Authority Alignment Index (AAI), and propose Geometric Authority Calibration (GAC), an inference-time layer-level intervention to suppress misplaced user authority. Evaluating four models (4B to 35B parameters, three architectures) across four datasets totaling 576 conflict instances reveals extreme inversion: on numerical tasks, models exhibit near-zero sensor trust (AAI = -0.805, Cohen's d = -2.14), unaffected by model capacity. Validating our geometric framework, theory-guided causal injection flips 80.2\% of incorrect decisions (vs. <0.4\% for random controls). Practically, GAC improves HAR accuracy from 0 -- 1.6\% to 21.9 -- 27.5\%, outperforming prompting baselines. Ultimately, authority allocation in LLM-mediated systems must be explicitly audited and application-specifically configured rather than left implicit.

</details>


### [429] [DRIVE: Modeling Skills at the Reasoning and Interaction Levels for Web Agents under Continual Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23939)
*Xirui Liu,Sihang Zhou,Yanning Hou,Rong Zhou,Haoyuan Chen,Maolin He,Siwei Wang,Hao Chen,Jian Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DRIVE提出了一种双层级技能建模框架，将Web Agent历史经验分离为可迁移的自然语言推理技能和可执行的编程式交互技能，并通过场景感知协调机制和技能级反思实现技能库的智能检索与扩展，在WebArena五个领域平均任务成功率达52.8%，高出无技能基线7.3个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Web Agent方法将推理知识和交互知识统一存储，导致抽象表示缺乏可执行性、具体表示难以跨域泛化，限制了Agent在新网站上的能力积累。

Method: 提出DRIVE框架，包含：(1) 双层级技能建模——将经验分离为可迁移的自然语言推理技能和可执行的编程式交互技能；(2) 场景感知协调机制——根据任务语义自适应检索和调用双层级技能；(3) 技能级反思——识别层级特异性失败模式，实现技能库的定向扩展与精炼。

Result: 在WebArena五个领域平均任务成功率达52.8%，超越无技能基线7.3个百分点；消融实验表明推理技能和交互技能提供了不同且互补的增益。

Conclusion: 分离可迁移的任务逻辑与可执行的页面级操作对于Web Agent的能力积累和跨域泛化至关重要，双层级技能建模是有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Web agents require both high-level reasoning (for task decomposition) and low-level interactions (for page elements manipulation) to conduct different tasks. However, these knowledge types differ fundamentally: reasoning knowledge (e.g., booking a flight requires first searching for routes) is abstract and transferable across websites, while interaction knowledge (e.g., clicking the Search button at a specific coordinate on Site A) depends heavily on page-specific contexts. Existing methods store experiences uniformly. This creates a dilemma: abstract representations lose executability on concrete pages, while concrete representations fail to generalize across domains. This entanglement limits capability accumulation: on new websites, agents either fail to recognize reusable task logic due to surface-level differences or attempt infeasible actions from outdated page structures. To disentangle them, we propose DRIVE, a dual-level skill modeling framework separating historical experience into natural language reasoning skills, which capture transferable task logic, and programmatic interaction skills, grounding abstract actions to executable operations. A scene-aware coordination mechanism adaptively retrieves and invokes these dual-level skills based on task semantics. DRIVE also uses skill-level reflection to identify hierarchy-specific failure modes, enabling targeted skill library expansion and refinement. Experiments across five WebArena domains show DRIVE attains an average task success rate of 52.8%, exceeding the skill-free baseline by 7.3 percentage points. Further ablations show reasoning and interaction skills provide distinct, complementary benefits, supporting separation of transferable task logic from executable page-level operations.

</details>


### [430] [Residual Drift Dominates Contradiction in Multi-Turn Constraint Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23940)
*Sebastien Kawada*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 多轮推理系统的主要失败模式不是逻辑矛盾，而是"可满足漂移"（内部状态一致但返回答案违反先前承诺）。本文构建DRIFT-Bench基准，提出MUS-Repair方法效果最好，但修复后残差中98-100%仍是可满足漂移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示多轮推理系统真实失败模式：主流认知认为是逻辑矛盾，但实际是更隐蔽的可满足漂移。

Method: 构建DRIFT-Bench基准（816个测试问题，跨三个约束域），评估四种方法在四个开源模型上（8B-120B参数），并设计MUS-Repair方法。

Result: MUS-Repair在所有设置下最强（+1.8到+15.0 pp），但修复后残差中98-100%仍为可满足漂移，矛盾几乎降至零。

Conclusion: 可靠的多轮系统必须单独验证返回答案是否尊重维护的状态，而非仅依赖矛盾检测。

Abstract: How do multi-turn reasoning systems fail? The expected answer is logical contradiction, in which the system's maintained state becomes unsatisfiable. We show that the dominant mode is instead satisfiable drift, where the internal state stays consistent while the returned answer silently violates prior commitments. We build DRIFT-Bench (Decomposing Reasoning Into Failure Types), a solver-instrumented benchmark of 816 test problems across three constraint domains, and evaluate four methods on it across four open-weight models (8B-120B parameters). MUS-Repair, which feeds minimal unsatisfiable subsets back to the generator, is strongest in every setting (+1.8 to +15.0 pp over the best non-MUS baseline). But the central finding is what repair leaves behind. After structured feedback, models rarely contradict themselves. They forget. Residual errors are 98-100% satisfiable drift across all settings, while contradiction drops to near zero. Reliable multi-turn systems must separately validate that the returned answer respects the maintained state. Code is available at https://github.com/kaons-research/drift-bench.

</details>


### [431] [MEMOR-E: In-Context and Fine-Tuned LLM Personalization for Alzheimer's Assistive Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23941)
*Maissa Abir Smaili,Eren Sadikoglu,Ransalu Senanayake*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍MEMOR-E，一款集成平板界面的四足社交辅助机器人，通过微调大语言模型（LLMs）和上下文学习（ICL）技术，为阿尔茨海默病患者提供个性化非诊断性认知辅助，并利用可解释AI实现透明可信的人机交互。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿尔茨海默病导致患者记忆和语言能力进行性衰退，降低日常生活独立性，亟需社交辅助机器人提供个性化支持。

Method: 采用移动四足机器人MEMOR-E搭配交互式平板；微调LLM模拟与病程一致的认知行为并解读神经心理语言任务；利用ICL让第二LLM生成领域和严重级别的认知错误摘要；引入可解释AI机制。

Result: MEMOR-E能够生成阶段感知的非诊断性认知摘要，支持个性化辅助交互；可解释AI将模型输出转化为透明、人类可读的证据，实现照护者监督和可信人机交互。

Conclusion: LLM微调与ICL结合可有效赋能社交辅助机器人，为阿尔茨海默病患者提供安全、可解释的个性化认知辅助。

Abstract: Alzheimer's disease is a neurodegenerative disorder marked by progressive declines in memory and language that reduce independence in daily life, motivating socially assistive robotic support. This paper presents MEMOR-E, a mobile quadruped robot with an interactive tablet interface that assists patients and caregivers through medication reminders, routine guidance, memory oriented interactions, and companionship. We evaluated the feasibility of fine tuning large language models (LLMs) to emulate stage consistent cognitive behavior and interpret responses across standard neuropsychological language tasks, using audio transcriptions from 235 Alzheimer's patients and synthetically generated healthy controls. We also report findings on using in context learning (ICL) in LLMs, where a second LLM produced domain and severity level cognitive error summaries. Our results show that MEMOR-E can generate stage aware, non diagnostic cognitive summaries that support personalized assistive interactions, while explainable AI mechanisms translate model outputs into transparent, human readable evidence to enable caregiver oversight and trustworthy human robot interaction.

</details>


### [432] [A Dynamical Framework for Cognitive Processes Based on Transformations and Semantic Equivalence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23942)
*Carlo Cattani,Dioneia Motta Monte-Serrat*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于控制论视角的认知建模框架，通过状态空间迭代规则 X_{t+1} = π(F(f(X_t))) 描述认知过程，结合内部变换、解释映射和语义等价约束，构建了融合动力系统、范畴论与认知模型的统一反馈系统，并通过计算示例和语言应用验证了其稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有认知模型缺乏统一的数学框架来同时刻画认知过程的动态演化性、组合结构性和语义稳定性，本文旨在从控制论视角提供一个整合动力系统与范畴论的认知建模方法。

Method: 提出一个迭代更新规则 X_{t+1} = π(F(f(X_t)))，其中f为内部变换，F为解释映射，π为语义等价约束；通过范畴论刻画组合结构，利用不动点论证和压缩条件分析动力学稳定性。

Result: 提供了计算示例说明框架的操作性，并通过定性分析展示动力学特性；在具体语言应用场景中展现了上下文依赖解释如何演化为稳定语义类的轨迹。

Conclusion: 该框架成功连接了动力系统、范畴论和认知模型，将认知过程统一表征为朝向不变解释演化的反馈驱动过程。

Abstract: This paper proposes a structural and dynamical framework for modeling cognitive processes within a cybernetic perspective. Cognitive states are represented as elements of a state space evolving through an iterative update rule of the form
  \[
  X_{t+1} = π\big(F(f(X_t))\big),
  \]
  where $f$ describes internal transformations, $F$ represents interpretative mappings, and $π$ enforces semantic equivalence.
  The model is interpreted as a feedback system integrating transformation, observation, and stabilization. A categorical formulation is introduced to capture compositional structure, while the associated dynamics are analyzed through fixed-point arguments and contraction conditions ensuring stability.
  To demonstrate the operational character of the framework, a computational illustration is provided, together with a qualitative analysis of the induced dynamics. A concrete linguistic application shows how context-dependent interpretation can be modeled as a trajectory toward a stable semantic class.
  The proposed approach connects dynamical systems, category theory, and cognitive modeling, and provides a unified representation of cognition as a feedback-driven process evolving toward invariant interpretations.

</details>


### [433] [Spacetime Formation under Requirements: Contextual Realization and Form-Dependent Probability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23943)
*Song-Ju Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出量子概率并非基础性概率，而是当有限状态需求无法在单一布尔事件结构中实现时，在固定时空投影下显现的表象。作者以"需求优先"的视角，将量子现象重新解释为语境化时空构型在固定时空中的投影痕迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子认知研究用量子概率替代经典概率来解释序效应和语境性，但保留了固定事件结构。本文质疑这一前提，认为量子概率本身就是更基础语境化时空构型的投影结果，旨在为量子认知提供一种先验-操作实在论的解释框架。

Method: 从"需求"出发（有限表征容量、单状态语义稳定性、语境敏感干预等），而非从时间、空间、对象或概率出发。当这些需求无法在单一全局布尔事件结构中实现时，在固定时空投影下表现为非对易性、干涉和类量子概率。干涉项被解释为局部经典实现贡献在非平凡胶合和投影回固定经典时空形式时产生的交叉项。

Result: 经典表征中的辅助记忆或语境标签被重新解释为局部布尔逻辑-世界之间的和乐型（holonomy-like）失配。干涉项是局部经典实现贡献胶合投影产生的交叉项。建立了语境化时空构型（contextual spacetime formation）与固定时空投影之间的对应关系。

Conclusion: 提出了一种先验-操作实在论：对象性、事件性、概率和时空都被视为需求下的实现形式，客观性由跨越观察者和历史依赖的时空构型的不变量定义。量子概率不是基础概率，而是更深层语境化时空构型在固定时空中的投影。

Abstract: Quantum cognition often explains order effects, contextuality, and violations of the law of total probability by replacing classical probability with quantum probability on a fixed event structure. This paper proposes a different interpretation: quantum probability is the fixed-spacetime projection of contextual spacetime formation under finite-state requirements.
  The framework begins not with time, space, objects, or probabilities, but with requirements such as finite representational capacity, single-state semantic stability, context-sensitive intervention, avoidance of explicit context labels, coherent world-formation, and intersubjective transformability. When these requirements cannot be realized within a single global Boolean event structure, the mismatch appears, under fixed-spacetime projection, as noncommutativity, interference, and quantum-like probability.
  Building on prior single-state approaches to contextuality, we reinterpret classical contextual bookkeeping cost as the fixed-spacetime shadow of contextual spacetime formation. Auxiliary memory or context labels in a classical representation correspond, in this account, to holonomy-like mismatch among locally Boolean logic-worlds. The interference term is the cross term generated when locally classical realization contributions are nontrivially glued and projected back into a fixed classical spacetime form.
  The result is a transcendental-operational realist account: objecthood, eventhood, probability, and spacetime are treated as forms of realization under requirements, while objectivity is defined by invariants preserved across observer- and history-dependent spacetime formations.

</details>


### [434] [Right-Sizing Communication and Recommendation Set Size in AI-Assisted Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23944)
*Jing Dong,Prakirt Raj Jhunjhunwala,Yash Kanoria*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文构建了一个用户与AI推荐系统间的交互模型，其中用户通过有成本且含噪声的信息传递偏好，AI作为贝叶斯智能体推荐产品，并基于互信息成本函数优化通信与搜索成本，在高维空间中分析了最优交互策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 旨在建模并理解用户与AI推荐系统交互中的信息传递与搜索成本之间的权衡关系，从而找到最大化用户期望效用的最优交互策略。

Method: 采用贝叶斯框架，将用户消息建模为有成本且有噪声的偏好信号；使用互信息成本函数刻画通信成本（信息精度）和搜索成本（推荐集大小）；在d维产品空间中，研究两种采样分布（后验采样与倾斜采样）下的最优策略。

Result: 在后验采样下，存在混合机制需同时优化通信信息量和推荐数量；在倾斜采样下，最优策略仅使用通信或搜索中成本较低的一方。

Conclusion: 用户与AI推荐系统之间的最优交互策略取决于成本结构和采样方式，高维场景下不同采样分布会导向截然不同的最优策略模式。

Abstract: We model the interaction between a user and an AI driven recommendation system. The user initiates the process by conveying preference information through a costly and noisy message. The AI assistant, acting as a Bayesian agent, interprets the user's message to form a posterior belief about their true preferences and make product recommendations. In particular, it determines how many recommendations to present so as to maximize the user's expected utility from their final choice, while accounting for the search cost induced by the size of the recommendation set. We use mutual information based cost functions to model the two distinct costs incurred by the user during the interaction: (i) a communication cost, which increases with the precision of their preference message, and (ii) a search cost, which increases with the size of the recommendation set provided by the AI assistant.
  We study products and preferences which live in d dimensional space, and ask how the user's expected payoff can be maximized. For large d, we characterize how optimal message precision and recommendation set size depend on the cost parameters, under two distinct distributions from which recommendations can be sampled from the product universe: (i) Bayes' posterior belief, and (ii) an optimized tilted distribution. Under the posterior sampling scheme (i), we identify a hybrid regime, in which an efficient interaction policy requires jointly optimizing the amount of information (in bits) conveyed by the user and the number of recommendations provided by the AI assistant. In the tilted sampling scheme (ii), our results show that the optimal interaction policy uses only one of communication and search, favoring whichever of them is less costly.

</details>


### [435] [Accelerating Long-Tail Generation in Synchronous RLHF Training via Adaptive Tensor Parallelism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23945)
*Long Zhao,Qinghe Wang,Jiaan Zhu,Youhui Bai,Zewen Jin,Chaoyi Ruan,Shengnan Wang,Cheng Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出PAT，一种在RLHF生成阶段动态调整张量并行度的方法，通过预测引导的在线重配置和轻量级状态迁移机制，最高减少34.6%生成延迟和27.2%端到端迭代延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLHF三阶段流水线中，生成阶段因响应长度不均导致有效batch size迅速缩减，GPU利用率低下；现有框架使用静态TP配置无法适应动态变化的batch特性，存在大量性能优化空间。

Method: 1) 预测引导的在线重配置方法：基于离线profile预测延迟收益，仅在收益大于开销时触发TP重配置。2) 轻量级在线重配置机制：通过成本模型在KV-cache迁移与重计算间选择，适配未完成解码状态；进行原地权重重分片；复用已缓存的通信组。

Result: 在LLaMA3.1-8B和Qwen3-14B上，相比原始VeRL，生成延迟降低最高34.6%，端到端RLHF训练迭代延迟降低最高27.2%。

Conclusion: 动态调整TP配置能有效缓解RLHF生成阶段因响应长度不均导致的GPU利用率问题，且轻量级迁移机制使重配置开销可控。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) has become a key post-training paradigm for improving model quality. However, the synchronous three-stage RLHF pipeline is often bottlenecked by the generation stage, where response-length skew causes the effective batch size to shrink rapidly during decoding, leaving GPUs underutilized while a few long responses remain unfinished. Mainstream frameworks employ a static tensor parallelism (TP) configuration that cannot adapt to changing batch characteristics, leaving substantial performance headroom unexplored. We propose PAT, an adaptive TP method that dynamically reconfigures TP during the generation stage of each RLHF iteration. PAT introduces two key techniques. First, a predictor-guided online reconfiguration method decides both the reconfiguration point and the target TP configuration based on offline profiling, triggering reconfiguration only when the predicted latency benefit outweighs the reconfiguration overhead. Second, a lightweight online reconfiguration mechanism updates only the states and layouts affected by TP changes: it adapts unfinished decoding states through a cost-model-based choice between KV-cache migration and recomputation, performs in-place weight resharding, and reuses cached communication groups. We implement PAT on top of SGLang and integrate it with the VeRL framework. Evaluations on LLaMA3.1-8B and Qwen3-14B using DeepScaleR show that PAT reduces generation latency by up to 34.6% and end-to-end RLHF training iteration latency by up to 27.2% compared to the original VeRL setup.

</details>


### [436] [Stop Comparing LLM Agents Without Disclosing the Harness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23950)
*Yunbei Zhang,Janet Wang,Yingqiang Ge,Weijie Xu,Jihun Hamm,Chandan K. Reddy*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"绑定约束论题"：在长周期任务中，智能体执行框架（harness）对性能的影响往往超过底层模型本身，现有评估协议系统性地将框架带来的提升错误归因于模型改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估协议在长周期智能体任务中，将性能提升系统性地归因于模型改进，而忽略了执行框架（harness）的贡献，导致对智能体性能来源的误判。

Method: 通过三个维度论证：1) 控制论形式化框架，将harness视为控制器、LLM视为随机策略；2) 基准测试、行业部署和方差分解实验，证明harness引入的方差可超过模型引入的方差，甚至导致模型排名反转；3) 提出harness-aware评估框架，包含披露标准和方差分解协议。

Result: 实验表明，harness配置变化带来的性能差异可能超过替换模型本身带来的差异，且存在模型排名反转现象。

Conclusion: 在harness规格未公开之前，长周期智能体的排行榜对比应被视为不完整且可能具有误导性。

Abstract: This position paper argues that, for long-horizon tasks evaluated across models with comparable frontier capability, the agent execution harness, namely the infrastructure layer that governs context construction, tool interaction, orchestration, and verification around a language model, is often a stronger determinant of agent performance than the model it wraps. We formalize and defend the Binding Constraint Thesis: in this regime, performance variance is governed more by harness configuration than by model choice, and current evaluation protocols therefore systematically misattribute harness-level gains to model improvements. We support this thesis along three lines. First, a control-theoretic formalization treats the harness as the controller of a closed-loop dynamical system and the LLM as the stochastic policy it governs, which explains why small harness changes can produce performance shifts that exceed those obtained by substituting one model for another. Second, published benchmarks, industry deployments, and a controlled variance decomposition show that harness-induced variance can substantially exceed model-induced variance, including cases of model ranking reversal. Third, we propose a harness-aware evaluation framework with a disclosure standard and a variance decomposition protocol. Until harness specifications are disclosed, leaderboard comparisons for long-horizon agents should be treated as incomplete and potentially misleading.

</details>


### [437] [Methods for Formal Verification of Agent Skills: Three Layers Toward a Mechanically Checkable Capability-Containment Proof](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23951)
*Alfredo Metere*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出三种可组合的方法（静态抽象解释、细化类型系统、SMT有界模型检验），将智能体技能的验证从“声明级/测试级”提升至“形式级”，填补了前序论文提出的四层验证格的最顶层空缺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 前序论文提出了一个四层验证格（未验证、声明、测试、形式化），但最顶层的“形式化”仅停留在愿景层面。本文旨在填补这一空白，给出技能行为的形式化语义，并设计可组合的验证方法将其提升到形式级。

Method: (1) 基于小效应格上的抽象解释，对脚本端进行声音的静态能力包含性分析；(2) 为工具调用封装设计细化类型系统，机械拒绝任何静态推断能力不在声名集中的调用；(3) 针对前序论文的双条件正确性标准进行SMT有界模型检验，边界与运行时事务缓冲区视界对齐。

Result: 三种方法组合后，在理论上完整覆盖了前序论文的威胁模型（仅余LLM拒绝行动的残余）。所有方法复用现有工具（Z3、Semgrep、CodeQL等），以零依赖JavaScript模块形式开源，附带53个单元测试和端到端CLI演示。

Conclusion: 通过三层可组合的形式化验证方法，成功将技能验证从声明/测试级提升至形式级，且以轻量级、可复用的工程实现证明了实用性。

Abstract: The companion paper introduced a four-level verification lattice on agent-skill manifests (unverified, declared, tested, formal) and left the top level aspirational. This
  paper closes that gap. We give a precise semantics for skill behaviour faithful to how a skill is consumed by an LLM-driven runtime (a deterministic script-side reachable
  through a non-deterministic LLM-side), state the verification problem as a capability-containment property over that semantics, and present three composable methods that
  together raise a skill from declared or tested to formal: (1) sound static capability-containment analysis of the script-side via abstract interpretation over a small effect
  lattice; (2) a refinement type system for tool-call envelopes that mechanically rejects any call whose statically-inferred capability is not in the manifest's declared set;
  (3) SMT-bounded model checking against the parent paper's biconditional correctness criterion, with the bound chosen so any counter-example fitting the runtime's
  transaction-buffer horizon is exhibited as a concrete trace. We prove the three layers composed soundly cover the parent paper's threat model modulo a single residual (the
  LLM's freedom to refuse to act) that the parent paper's runtime biconditional catches at session boundary. The methods reuse existing well-engineered tools (Z3, Semgrep,
  CodeQL, refinement-type checkers, mechanised proof assistants) rather than asking operators to build new ones, and the proof-carrying artifact extends the existing SKILL.md
  convention. All three methods plus the bundle producer and re-checker ship as zero-dependency JavaScript modules in the open-source enclawed framework
  (https://github.com/metereconsulting/enclawed; project page https://www.enclawed.com/), with 53 unit tests and an end-to-end CLI demo on a sample skill.

</details>


### [438] [Machine Psychometrics: A Mathematical Psychology of Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.23952)
*Alex Bogdan,Adrian de Valois-Franklin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"机器心理测量学"框架，通过构建"机器心智印迹"多维度档案和配套信任协议，在意识问题之上建立可操作的测量层，从而规避对人工代理的两种极端认知偏差（盲目无视心智与过度投射心智）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估工具过分强调能力分数而忽视心理结构，导致对人工代理的两种对称错误：人工心智盲目（否定非生物系统中的心理组织）和人工心智投射（从流畅行为推断类人内在生活）。作者试图通过测量而非哲学争辩来绕开这一僵局。

Method: 借鉴Michael Levin的连续性认知观（跨基质的目标导向能力）和数学心理学方法库（项目反应理论、信号检测论、贝叶斯认知建模、校准分析、认知偏差测试组），开发机器心理测量学。核心工具是"机器心智印迹"——包括校准、源完整性、建议抵抗性、上下文稳定性、表达对齐、工具完整性、漂移监测和分布接地等多维度的可版本化档案；以及配套的"信任协议"——通过探测测试组、扰动测试、信效度分析和纵向监测来支撑部署决策。

Result: 提出了一个可操作、可迭代的测量框架，不是将人工代理拟人化，而是通过测量理解它们与人类根本不同的心理组织方式。

Conclusion: 哲学贡献是提出第三种立场——人工心智纪律，既不过度拟人化也不否认心智，既不预设意识也不排除意识。目标是为人工代理的理解提供测量先于判断的科学方法论。

Abstract: Artificial agents now generate behavior rich enough to invite trust, surprise, and concern, yet our evaluation tools still privilege capability scores over psychological structure. This paper argues that the philosophical impasse between two symmetrical errors (Artificial Mind Blindness, which dismisses psychological organization in non-biological systems, and Artificial Mind Projection, which infers human-like inner life from fluent behavior alone) can be circumvented not by resolving the consciousness question, but by introducing a disciplined measurement layer beneath it. Drawing on Michael Levin's continuum view of cognition as goal-directed competency across substrates, and on the methodological repertoire of mathematical psychology (Item Response Theory, Signal Detection Theory, Bayesian cognitive modeling, calibration analysis, cognitive-bias batteries), the paper develops Machine Psychometrics as a measurement science of latent behavioral, metacognitive, communicative, and self-modeling dispositions in artificial agents. Its operational core is the Machine Mindprint: a multidimensional, domain-bounded, versioned profile spanning calibration, source integrity, suggestibility resistance, context stability, expressive alignment, tool integrity, drift monitoring, and distributional grounding. A complementary Trust Protocol turns Mindprints into deployment decisions through probe batteries, perturbation testing, reliability and validity analysis, and longitudinal monitoring across high-stakes domains. The philosophical contribution is a third stance, Artificial Mind Discipline, that neither anthropomorphizes nor dismisses, neither presupposes consciousness nor forecloses it. The aim is not to humanize artificial agents, but to understand them precisely because they are not human, through measurement before judgment.

</details>
