TL;DR: 本文提出智能体AI的下一个瓶颈在于系统层面的"缰绳扩展"（scaling the harness），即围绕基础模型构建可审计、持久化、模块化、可验证的执行架构。作者开发了CheetahClaws参考框架，论证了未来智能体AI的进步将同样依赖于系统设计，而非仅仅更强的基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体AI的评估过于以模型为中心，将记忆、检索、工具使用、编排、验证和治理等系统组件视为次要实现细节，然而智能体性能实际上源于这些组件与基础模型的交互涌现。这种框架已不足以指导进一步的进展。

Method: 识别智能体缰绳的三个核心瓶颈：上下文治理（context governance）、可信记忆（trustworthy memory）和动态技能路由（dynamic skill routing），以及协调和约束这些瓶颈的编排与治理机制。开发了CheetahClaws作为Python原生参考实现，并与Claude Code和OpenClaw进行对比。

Result: 提出了超越单次任务成功的缰绳级基准测试研究议程，涵盖轨迹质量、记忆卫生、上下文效率、通信保真度、验证代价和随时间的安全演化等维度。

Conclusion: 未来智能体AI的进步将同样依赖于系统设计（缰绳扩展）和更强的基础模型，两者缺一不可。

Abstract: This paper studies the next major bottleneck in agentic AI as system scaling, not only model scaling: the design of auditable, persistent, modular, and verifiable architectures around foundation models. We refer to this shift as scaling the harness: treating the structured execution layer around a foundation model as a first-class object of design, evaluation, and optimization. Although recent large language models enable agents to use tools, retrieve information, maintain memory, and execute long-horizon workflows, evaluation remains largely model-centric, often reducing agents to final-task success while treating memory, retrieval, tool use, orchestration, verification, and governance as secondary implementation details. This framing is increasingly inadequate because agent performance emerges from the interaction among the foundation model, memory substrate, context constructor, skill-routing layer, orchestration loop, and verification-and-governance layer. Together, these components form the agent harness, which translates model capability into long-horizon agent behavior. We study scaling the harness through three core bottlenecks: context governance, trustworthy memory, and dynamic skill routing, together with the orchestration and governance mechanisms that coordinate and constrain them. We further outline a research agenda for harness-level benchmarks that go beyond one-shot task success to measure trajectory quality, memory hygiene, context efficiency, communication fidelity, verification cost, and safe evolution over time. To make the discussion concrete, we develop CheetahClaws: https://github.com/SafeRL-Lab/cheetahclaws, a Python-native reference harness, and compare it with Claude Code and OpenClaw. Our main claim is that future progress in agentic AI will depend as much on system design as on stronger foundation models.

</details>


### [581] [MobileGym: A Verifiable and Highly Parallel Simulation Platform for Mobile GUI Agent Research](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26114)
*Dingbang Wu,Rui Hao,Haiyang Wang,Shuzhe Wu,Han Xiao,Zhenghong Li,Bojiang Zhou,Zheng Ju,Zichen Liu,Lue Fan,Zhaoxiang Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MobileGym是一个轻量级、可完全控制的浏览器端移动端环境，支持结构化JSON状态驱动的确定性评判和大规模并行在线强化学习。配合MobileGym-Bench基准（416个任务模板），在Sim-to-Real场景下，GRPO训练Qwen3-VL-4B模型在256任务测试集上提升12.8个百分点，真实设备保留95.1%的训练收益。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动端交互环境要么依赖专有后端（如Android模拟器），成本高、可复现性差；要么在交互保真度和可扩展性上存在局限，难以支持日常应用的可验证结果信号和大规模在线RL训练。

Method: 提出MobileGym框架：(1) 基于浏览器托管，轻量可控；(2) 全环境状态以结构化JSON捕获、配置、分叉和比较；(3) 分层状态模型+声明式任务定义框架，支持规模化任务创建；(4) 单一程序化评判机制提供确定性评估和稠密RL奖励；(5) 单个服务器可承载数百并行实例（~400MB/实例，~3s冷启动）；(6) 配套MobileGym-Bench含416个参数化任务模板。

Result: 在Sim-to-Real案例中，GRPO在Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct上于256任务测试集获得+12.8个百分点的提升；在59任务真实设备信号子集上，真实设备执行保留模拟端训练收益的95.1%。

Conclusion: MobileGym验证了轻量级、可复现的移动端模拟环境能够有效桥接仿真与真实的差距，为日常移动场景下的自主智能体训练提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: We present MobileGym, a browser-hosted, lightweight, fully controllable environment for everyday mobile use, targeting interaction fidelity without replicating proprietary backends. It enables two capabilities previously out of reach for everyday apps: verifiable outcome signals through deterministic state-based judging over structured JSON state, and scalable online RL through low-cost parallel rollouts. The full environment state is captured, configured, forked, and compared as structured JSON, and a single server can host hundreds of parallel instances, with about 400 MB memory per instance and about 3 s cold start. A layered state model and a declarative task-definition framework keep state programmability and task creation practical at scale, and a single programmatic judging mechanism delivers both deterministic evaluation verdicts and dense RL rewards. The accompanying MobileGym-Bench provides 416 parameterized task templates, including 256 test and 160 train templates, over 28 apps, with deterministic judges and a structured AnswerSheet protocol that avoids free-text matching failures. In a Sim-to-Real case study, GRPO on Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct gains +12.8 percentage points on the 256-task test set, and on a 59-task real-device signal subset, real-device execution retains 95.1% of the simulation-side training gain. Project page: https://mobilegym.github.io.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [582] [Snapshot Polarimetric Display Inverse Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24915)
*Seokjun Choi,Yunseong Moon,Kaizhang Kang,Hoon-Gyu Chung,Jin-Nyeong Kim,Giljoo Nam,Seung-Hwan Baek*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用LCD投影线性偏振RGB图案和偏振相机进行单次拍摄的偏振显示逆渲染方法，通过前馈Transformer网络从光谱偏振测量中恢复每像素的法线、反照率、粗糙度和金属度，在真实桌面场景中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的逆渲染在单次拍摄（snapshot）配置下信息极度受限，难以恢复高质量几何与材质。现有研究尝试通过时间调制、光谱编码、偏振等维度丰富信息，但仍面临信息瓶颈。本文旨在利用偏振显示与偏振相机结合的方案，在单次拍摄中获取更丰富的偏振-光谱信息，提升逆渲染精度。

Method: 使用LCD投影仪投射线性偏振RGB二值图案，并用加装四分之一波片的RGB偏振相机采集光谱偏振测量数据。设计前馈Transformer网络将测量值映射为每像素的法线、反照率、粗糙度和金属度。为解决训练数据不足，通过生成流形（generative manifold）扩展有限的实测偏振BRDF数据。

Result: 在真实桌面实验平台上，该方法在多种场景下实现了准确的逆渲染，效果优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 本文证明偏振显示逆渲染是单次逆渲染中一种有效的新维度，结合偏振调制与Transformer能够在桌面级轻量化配置下取得优异的材质与几何重建结果。

Abstract: Inverse rendering remains a core challenge in graphics and vision, especially in the snapshot configurations required for lightweight desktop workflows, where the per-frame information budget is highly constrained. Previous inverse rendering work explores various available dimensions for enriching the per-shot information, including temporal modulation, spectral encoding, and polarization. In this work, we introduce polarimetric display inverse rendering, using an LCD to project a linearly polarized RGB binary pattern and an RGB polarization camera augmented with a quarter-wave plate to acquire spectro-polarimetric measurements in a single shot. A feed-forward transformer maps these measurements to per-pixel normal, albedo, roughness, and metallicity. To overcome training data scarcity, we expand a limited set of measured polarimetric bidirectional reflectance distribution functions via a generative manifold. Evaluations on a real desktop setup demonstrate accurate inverse rendering across diverse scenes, outperforming existing approaches.

</details>


### [583] [Depth Peeling for High-Fidelity Gaussian-Enhanced Surfel Rendering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25345)
*Keyang Ye,Hongzhi Wu,Kun Zhou*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出DP-GES，通过半透明边界增强的surfels和Depth Peeling实现无排序渲染，消除锯齿和弹跳伪影，提升重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GES方法存在锯齿伪影和次优重建问题，NeRF/3DGS需要排序渲染效率低。

Method: 用半透明边界增强不透明surfels，结合Depth Peeling建立逐像素精确排序，实现无排序高斯泼溅和正确透射率调制。

Result: 在多种场景下达到优于现有技术的重建质量，消除锯齿和弹跳伪影。

Conclusion: DP-GES在排序无关渲染中实现了高质量重建，有效解决了GES的伪影问题。

Abstract: Novel view synthesis has been significantly advanced by NeRFs and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), which require ordering volumetric samples or primitives for correct color blending. While the recent Gaussian-Enhanced Surfels (GES) enable high-performance, sort-free rendering, they suffer from aliasing artifacts and suboptimal reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose DP-GES, a novel representation that augments opaque surfels with semi-transparent boundaries and leverages Depth Peeling to establish accurate per-pixel ordering. This design enables sort-free Gaussian splatting with correct transmittance modulation, effectively eliminating aliasing and popping artifacts while facilitating a fully differentiable joint optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior reconstruction quality and compares favorably against state-of-the-art techniques across a wide range of scenes.

</details>


### [584] [Learning View-Dependent Splatting Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25426)
*Huakeng Ding,Zhanpeng Liu,Fan Pei,Kun Zhou,Hongzhi Wu*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出了一种可微分的框架，用于在splatting管线中自动学习视角依赖的2D核，通过将体积基元定义为边界椭球体+3D核潜在向量，联合优化投影网络和解码器，在新型视图合成任务上优于现有方法，并可扩展到2D splatting和图像表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的splatting方法大多使用固定的、手工设计的核函数（如高斯核），缺乏对视角依赖关系的建模能力，限制了重建质量和表示效率。作者希望提出一种可学习的、视角依赖的2D核，以提升3D视图合成的效果。

Method: 1. 定义体积基元：由边界椭球体和3D核潜在向量组成。2. 学习投影网络：输入椭球体属性和3D核潜在向量，输出2D核潜在向量。3. 解码器：将2D核潜在向量解码为径向对称的2D核（基于马氏距离），受椭球体投影边界约束。4. 联合优化神经网络与每个基元的属性。

Result: 在标准基准测试上，该方法在分析核和可学习核两种设定下均优于现有最先进技术。扩展实验也验证了在2D splatting和图像表示上的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过学习视角依赖的2D核，可以显著提升splatting管线的重建质量和表示效率，且该思路具有良好的泛化性，可推广到2D场景。

Abstract: We present a differentiable framework to automatically learn view-dependent 2D kernels in a splatting-based pipeline to improve reconstruction quality and representation efficiency for novel 3D view synthesis. Our volumetric primitive is defined as a bounding ellipsoid and a 3D-kernel latent vector. We first learn a projection network to output a 2D-kernel latent, taking the attributes of the ellipsoid and the 3D-kernel latent as input. Next, the result is sent to a decoder to produce a radially symmetric 2D kernel in terms of Mahalanobis distance, bounded by the projected ellipsoid. The neural networks along with per-primitive attributes are jointly optimized. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated on standard benchmarks, comparing favorably against state-of-the-art techniques on both analytical and learned kernels. Finally, we extend the idea to learn general 2D kernels for 2D splatting as well as image representation.

</details>


### [585] [Curve Skeletonization in Continuous domain for Meshes and Point Clouds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25921)
*Jai Bardhan,Ramya Hebbalaguppe,Aravind Udupa*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出 CSCD 框架，将曲线骨架化从离散域推广到连续域，包括面向网格的 CSCD-M（首个基于内在三角剖分的方法）和面向点云的 CSCD-PC（使用簇状拉普拉斯算子），在多项基准测试中超越现有方法（如 LS、CoverageAxis++、EPCS），并在分类、分割、几何特征识别等下游任务中展现有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于局部分隔符（LS）的骨架化方法虽然高效，但由于离散化的本质导致表征不精确。为了克服这一局限性，作者希望将骨架化推广到连续域，从而提升鲁棒性和保真度。

Method: 提出 CSCD 框架，基于连续域曲线骨架化。包含两个具体实现：CSCD-M 利用网格的内在三角剖分实现抗噪性和更好的拓扑保持，是首个内在方法；CSCD-PC 采用簇状拉普拉斯算子（tufted Laplacians）增强点云骨架化的鲁棒性。

Result: CSCD-M 在各种网格数据上匹配 LS 性能，并在 Thingi10k 等基准上超越 LS (TOG'21)；CSCD-PC 定性地优于 CoverageAxis++ (Eurographics'24) 和 EPCS (CAG'23)。

Conclusion: CSCD 框架在多个下游任务（物体分类、形状分割、几何特征识别）中展现有效性，证明了连续域骨架化方法在精度和鲁棒性上的优势。

Abstract: Advancements in 3D curve skeletonization are accelerating progress across a wide range of applications. However, developing robust skeletonization algorithms that capture intricate object details remains challenging. Skeletonization via Local Separators (LS) offers an efficient graph-based approach but suffers from representation inaccuracies due to its discrete nature. To address this, we introduce CSCD, a novel framework for Curve Skeletonization in the Continuous Domain, generalizing LS to manifolds. Specifically, we present two realizations: CSCD-M for meshes and CSCD-PC for point clouds. CSCD-M leverages the intrinsic triangulation of a mesh for resilience to noise and improved topological preservation, while CSCD-PC employs tufted Laplacians for enhanced robustness. To our knowledge, CSCD-M is the first intrinsic method for curve skeletonization. Our results show CSCD-M matches LS performance across diverse meshes and outperforms LS (TOG'21) on benchmarks like Thingi10k dataset. CSCD-PC qualitatively outperforms CoverageAxis++ (Eurographics'24) and EPCS (CAG'23). Finally, we demonstrate the efficacy of CSCD in a few downstream tasks: object classification, shape segmentation, identifying handles, tunnels, and constrictions in objects. Project Website: https://cscd-skel.pages.dev

</details>


### [586] [F-RNG: Feed-Forward Relightable Neural Gaussians](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25975)
*Guangming Fu,Jiahui Fan,Jian Yang,Miloš Hašan,Beibei Wang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: F-RNG是一个前馈式框架，能从稀疏视角输入直接生成可重照明的3DGS资产。它基于现有的大型重建模型(LRM)和内在分解模型(IDM)，通过潜在插值几何合成、先验引导的可重照明外观蒸馏及通用神经渲染器，在无需重新训练LRM的情况下实现高效高质量的重照明，速度提升约25倍，质量提升约+2.0 dB。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于3DGS的可重照明方法主要分为两类：逐场景优化的方法需要密集输入视图且难以泛化；前馈式通用模型虽能从稀疏视图直接重建，但生成的资产烘焙了光照信息，无法用于重照明。如何以可接受的计算成本实现前馈式可重照明资产生成是核心挑战。

Method: 1) 潜在插值细粒度几何合成(Latent-Interpolated Fine-grained Geometry Synthesis)：增强LRM的几何表示能力；2) 先验引导的可重照明外观蒸馏(Prior-guided Relightable Appearance Distillation)：结合IDM先验提取可重照明的神经表示；3) 通用神经渲染器(Universal Neural Renderer)：实现灵活高保真的重照明渲染。该方法无需重新训练或微调底层LRM。

Result: 相比最先进的基于LRM的重照明方法，F-RNG重照明速度提升约25倍，质量提升约+2.0 dB。

Conclusion: F-RNG以轻量级网络和可负担的数据计算资源，实现了前馈式可重照明3DGS资产生成，避免了大型模型在不同光照条件下的重复推理，且能自动受益于未来更优的LRM和IDM。

Abstract: Capturing relightable 3D assets from real-world objects is a widely researched problem. Several per-scene optimization-based methods, based on 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS), support relighting; however, they usually require dense input views, and their overfitting nature makes it difficult to generalize across scenes. Unlike per-scene optimization methods, generalized feed-forward models can directly reconstruct Gaussians from sparse input views. However, the resulting assets have baked-in illumination and cannot be easily used for relighting. In this paper, we present F-RNG, a feed-forward framework that directly generates relightable 3DGS assets from sparse-view inputs. Training such a model from scratch can require massive data and computing resources, and it is especially challenging to generate relightable assets in a feed-forward manner with acceptable cost. We develop F-RNG upon an existing large reconstruction model (LRM) to extract relightable representations, while also utilizing priors from an intrinsic decomposition model (IDM). Specifically, we first introduce a latent-interpolated fine-grained geometry synthesis to enhance the LRM's geometry representation. Second, we propose a prior-guided relightable appearance distillation to extract relightable neural representations by incorporating IDM priors. Finally, a universal neural renderer enables flexible and high-fidelity relighting. F-RNG requires neither re-training nor fine-tuning of the underlying LRMs, thus can automatically benefit from better LRMs and IDMs in the future. With only small networks that can be trained with affordable data and computational resources, F-RNG avoids the repetitive inference of large models under different light conditions. By comparison to the state-of-the-art LRM-based relighting method, F-RNG achieves ~25x faster relighting, as well as superior quality (~+2.0 dB).

</details>


### [587] [Look Both Ways Before You Cross: Lifting Cross Fields From 2D Visual Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26062)
*Dale Decatur,Jacob Serfaty,Oded Stein,Amir Vaxman,Rana Hanocka*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出CrossLift方法，利用文本到图像的先验知识，从2D图像中提取方向信号并反投影到3D网格表面，实现特征对齐的交叉场生成和四边形网格划分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的交叉场计算方法通常仅基于几何特征（如曲率），难以捕捉高层语义特征（如纹理、用户意图）。作者希望利用2D视觉先验（如文本到图像模型）来指导3D网格上的方向场设计，实现语义对齐的四边形网格生成。

Method: 1) 利用文本到图像先验生成特征对齐的2D四边形网格方向；2) 提取每像素方向信号并反投影到3D网格表面；3) 通过两次平滑插值（视图内和跨视图）聚合候选方向；4) 设计基于置信度的权重，解决同一面片的方向冲突并平滑插值到遮挡区域。

Result: 在多种有机和机械形状上验证了方法有效性，生成的四边形网格在语义对齐方面优于现有方法。此外，还展示了纹理对齐四边形网格和基于用户手绘线条的交互式交叉场设计等应用。

Conclusion: CrossLift是一种模块化方法，可适配多种2D视觉先验，能够将图像中的语义方向信息有效迁移到3D网格，实现语义感知的交叉场计算和四边形网格生成。

Abstract: We present CrossLift, a technique for computing cross fields on meshes guided by visual features in images. We leverage powerful text-to-image priors that are capable of synthesizing images of feature-aligned quad meshes in 2D. We extract this signal as explicit per-pixel directions in the 2D images, which we then back-project to the mesh surface. We aggregate these candidate surface directions by performing two smooth interpolations on the mesh surface (first within each view and second across multiple views). We propose custom confidence-based weights for the candidate directions in each interpolation that allow us to resolve conflicts between candidates on the same face and smoothly interpolate our field to occluded faces. Our method is modular and can be used with many different 2D visual priors. We show additional applications to texture-aligned quad meshing as well as interactive cross-field design using coarse, user-drawn lines as signal. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CrossLift on a diverse set of both organic and mechanical shapes and produce quad meshes that exhibit superior semantic alignment as compared to existing methods. Project page at: https://crosslift.github.io/

</details>
